LastCorruptedRecord3-8ED_31.english: No! Don't go! I don't want to be alone again!
LastCorruptedRecord3-8ED_31.korean: 싫어! 가지 마세요! 또 혼자가 되는 건 싫어요!

LastCorruptedRecord3-8ED_32.english: did something wrong, I did something wrong, I did something wrong, I did something wrong!

LastCorruptedRecord3-8ED_34.english: It's okay, I'll stay here for you.
LastCorruptedRecord3-8ED_34.korean: 괜찮아, 내가 대신 여기 있어 줄게.

LastCorruptedRecord3-8ED_35.korean: 널 혼자 두게 하지 않을 테니까.

LastCorruptedRecord3-8ED_36.english: So stop the tears! If you keep smiling, good things will surely happen.
LastCorruptedRecord3-8ED_36.korean: 그러니까 눈물 뚝!&n웃고 지내다 보면 분명 좋은 일이 생길 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord3-8ED_39.english: So stop the tears! You're a grown-up, why are you crying!
LastCorruptedRecord3-8ED_39.korean: 그러니까 눈물 뚝! 다 큰 애가 뭘 울고 그래!

LastCorruptedRecord3-8ED_4.english: Hey, it's over now, so let's go back.

LastCorruptedRecord3-8ED_40.english: If you keep crying like that… uh… you’ll become like Ur!
LastCorruptedRecord3-8ED_40.korean: 너 그렇게 계속 울면… 어… 우르처럼 된다!

LastCorruptedRecord3-8ED_43.english: Not long after communication was cut off, Mina and her group returned after completing their mission.
LastCorruptedRecord3-8ED_43.korean: - 통신이 끊어지고 얼마 지나지 않아. 미나 일행이 임무를 마치고 돌아왔다.

LastCorruptedRecord3-8ED_44.english: Mina! That's a relief. I was worried because the communication suddenly cut off.

LastCorruptedRecord3-8ED_45.english: There was an Iron Bug interfering with the communication. It's okay, everyone is safe.
LastCorruptedRecord3-8ED_45.korean: 통신을 방해하는 철충이 있었어.&n괜찮아, 다들 무사해.

LastCorruptedRecord3-8ED_46.english: Yes! Then that's a relief. Ur and Efnel too...

LastCorruptedRecord3-8ED_47.english: … Mina? The two of you over there…

LastCorruptedRecord3-8ED_50.english: … Why, what are you staring at like that?

LastCorruptedRecord3-8ED_51.english: It's nothing. Just a moment, it seems like the two of you have gotten really close since I last saw you.
LastCorruptedRecord3-8ED_51.korean: 아무것도 아니에요.&n잠깐, 안 보는 사이 두 사람이 많이 친해진 거 같아서요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-8ED_52.english: Did something happen? Urga is clinging so tightly.
LastCorruptedRecord3-8ED_52.korean: 무슨 일이라도 있었나요?&n우르가 그렇게 꼬옥 붙어 있고.

LastCorruptedRecord3-8ED_53.english: Nothing happened! Hey! I'm back, so you stay away from me too!
LastCorruptedRecord3-8ED_53.korean: 아무 일도 없었어!&n얌마! 돌아왔으니까 너도 이제 그만 떨어져!

LastCorruptedRecord3-8ED_54.english: Following Tiamat, this time Efnell has started to look like a mom.
LastCorruptedRecord3-8ED_54.korean: 티아멧에 이어서 이번에는 에프넬이 엄마처럼 보이기 시작했사와요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-8ED_57.english: Mama~ I don't want to be separated~

LastCorruptedRecord3-8ED_58.english: don't remember ever giving birth to a daughter as big as you!
LastCorruptedRecord3-8ED_58.korean: 너 같은 덩치 큰 딸 낳은 기억은 없거든!

LastCorruptedRecord3-8ED_6.korean: 뭐, 뭣... 왜 그래? 무슨 일인데?

LastCorruptedRecord3-8ED_8.english: The communicator? Ah, isn't it broken because of that noisy thing? Communication interference? Something like that.
LastCorruptedRecord3-8ED_8.korean: 통신기? 아, 그 시끄러운 녀석 때문에 고장난 거 아니야?&n통신 방해? 뭐 그런 거겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord3-8ED_9.english: It's all over anyway, isn't it? As for the communicator, I'll just go back and fix it—
LastCorruptedRecord3-8ED_9.korean: 어차피 다 끝났잖아? 통신기야 돌아가서 고치면 그만ㅡ

LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_1.english: [c][00FF00][Mina, ba… Do you know why iron rusts easily in seawater?][-][/c]
LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_1.korean: [c][00FF00][미나, 바… 바닷물에서 철이 잘 녹스는 이유가 뭔지 알아?][-][/c]

LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_10.english: Do you really find that funny?

LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_11.english: Ahaha, actually, it’s not really my taste, but it’s okay since Ur is doing it. Sometimes really funny things do come out, after all.
LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_11.korean: 아하하, 사실 취향은 아니지만, 우르가 하는 거니까 괜찮아요.&n가끔은 정말 재밌는 게 나올 때도 있으니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_12.english: How long do I have to keep listening to that kind of banter? And on top of that, why are they suddenly telling us to do a mission as a trio this time?
LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_12.korean: 대체 언제까지 저런 농담 따먹기나 들어야 하는 거야?&n게다가 왜 갑자기 이번에는 셋이서 임무를 하라는 거고?

LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_13.english: Telling the three of us to coordinate... it's not like we're doing some kind of training.
LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_13.korean: 셋이서 호흡을 맞춰보라니… 이게 무슨 훈련하는 것도 아니고.

LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_15.english: Well, whatever. As long as I get paid for any mission, that’s all that matters to me.
LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_15.korean: 뭐, 아무래도 좋아.&n나는 어떤 임무든 보수만 받으면 되는 거니까.

LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_16.english: I'm not sure if I'll really be able to get it, though.

LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_17.english: Come to think of it, was it Orca...? I mean the group you guys belong to. You said you work to take down Iron Bug (Iron Bugs), but exactly what kind of place is it? It looks quite influential.
LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_17.korean: 그러고 보니 오르카… 라고 했던가? 너희들이 속한 집단 말이야.&n철충을 쓰러트리는 일을 한다고 했는데 정확히 뭐하는 곳이야? 영향력 있어 보이는데.

LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_18.english: Orca is a place that aims to eliminate all Iron Bug (Iron Bugs) and rebuild humanity.
LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_18.korean: 오르카는 모든 철충을 없애고 인류를 재건하는 걸 목표로 하는 곳이에요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_19.english: … It may be hard to believe, but humanity has been wiped out by the Iron Bug (Iron Bugs). You are the only human left alive, Commander.
LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_19.korean: …믿기 어려우시겠지만, 지금 인류는 철충들에 의해 멸망한 상태예요.&n사령관이 살아남아 있는 유일한 인간님이시죠.

LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_20.english: The only human? What are you talking about? You guys are here too.
LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_20.korean: 유일한 인간? 무슨 소리야? 너희들도 있잖아.

LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_21.english: … Actually, we are not human. We are bioroids created by humans.
LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_21.korean: …사실 저희는 인간이 아니에요.&n인간님들에 의해 만들어진 바이오로이드죠.

LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_22.english: Bioroid… Does that mean humans created artificially…?

LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_23.english: You must have had a hard time.

LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_24.english: What? Why do you think that?

LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_25.english: Because what those so-called scientists do is all the same. They must have done a ton of nonsense under the guise of experiments and whatnot.
LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_25.korean: 과학자라는 놈들이 하는 일이 다 거기서 거기니까.&n분명 실험이니 뭐니 하면서 말 같지도 않은 짓을 잔뜩 해댔겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_26.english: There are certainly many bioroids that have been treated that way.
LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_26.korean: 분명 그런 취급을 당한 바이오로이드들도 많아요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_27.english: Mercury and I were relatively okay, but I heard that Tiamat and Ur were created for experimental purposes from the start, so there were many terrible experiments.
LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_27.korean: 저랑 머큐리는 그나마 괜찮은 편이었지만, 티아멧과 우르는 처음부터 실험을 목적으로 만들어졌기 때문에 끔찍한 실험도 많았다고 들었어요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_29.english: [c][00FF00][I didn't hear you well, were you talking about me just now?][-][/c]
LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_29.korean: [c][00FF00][잘 못들었는데 지금 내 얘기 하고 있었어?][-][/c]

LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_30.english: Oh, it's nothing. Are you feeling a bit better, Ur?

LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_31.english: [c][00FF00][Yeah… so far… I’m okay. Still, I wish… it would end soon.][-][/c]
LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_31.korean: [c][00FF00][응… 아직까진… 괜찮아. 그래도 빨리 끝났으면… 좋겠어.][-][/c]

LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_32.english: Yeah, I'll be able to finish it quickly. Don't worry too much.
LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_32.korean: 응, 금방 끝낼 수 있을 거야.&n너무 걱정하지 마.

LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_33.english: Anyway, the point is that we, the Orca, exist to rebuild humanity from the Iron Bug (Iron Bugs).
LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_33.korean: 아무튼, 철충으로부터 인류를 재건하기 위해 존재하는 게 우리 오르카라는 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_34.english: Hmm... Then, if I join that place called Orca, can I get paid more?
LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_34.korean: 흐응… 그럼 말이야. 내가 그 오르카라는 곳에 들어가면 돈을 더 받을 수 있는 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_35.english: What? That might be true, but... like this, so suddenly?

LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_36.english: What's wrong? I'm saying I'll fight to protect justice and hope for humanity. Is there a problem?
LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_36.korean: 왜 그래? 이 내가 인류의 정의와 희망을 수호하기 위해서 싸워주겠다는 거잖아. 문제라도 있어?

LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_37.english: Didn't you just ask if you could get more money...?
LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_37.korean: 방금 전에 돈을 더 받을 수 있냐고 물어보지 않았나요…?

LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_38.english: It is only natural that a small fee is required to safeguard humanity's justice and hope.
LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_38.korean: 인류의 정의와 희망을 수호하기 위해 본래 약간의 대금이 필요한 법이지.

LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_39.english: You seem to take money very seriously, Mr. Fnel? But you didn't seem that greedy.
LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_39.korean: 에프넬 씨는 돈을 매우 중요하게 생각하시는 군요?&n하지만 그렇게 욕심내는 것 같지는 않던데.

LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_40.english: It's important to get paid to work. Because money doesn't betray you.
LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_40.korean: 돈을 받고 일하는 게 중요한 거야.&n돈은 배신하지 않으니까.

LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_41.english: Are there no people like me in Orca?
LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_41.korean: 오르카에는 나 같은 사람은 없는 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_42.english: It’s not that there aren’t any, but most of the members want something different.
LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_42.korean: 전혀 없는 건 아니지만, 대부분의 대원들은 다른 걸 원하고 계셔요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_43.english: Something else? What on earth is that?

LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_44.english: Ah... ...that...is related to the Commander...so, I mean...
LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_44.korean: 아…... 그건… 사령관과 관련이 있는 건데… 그게 그러니까…

LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_45.english: You don't mean to want to be praised by that commander or anything like that, do you?
LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_45.korean: 설마 그 사령관에게 칭찬받기를 원한다거나 그런 건 아니지?

LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_47.english: Ha! Then those guys are the ones in the wrong! No one helps others for free! They must have wanted something else, right?
LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_47.korean: 하! 그럼 그놈들이 잘못된 거야!&n열정 페이로 남을 돕는 인간은 없어! 분명 다른 원하는 게 있었을 걸?

LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_49.english: Anyway, I absolutely refuse to work for passion! Once all the missions are finished, I will definitely get paid in full!
LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_49.korean: 아무튼 나는 열정 페이는 죽어도 사절이니까!&n모든 임무가 끝나면 반드시 대금을 전부 받아낼 거야!

LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_5.english: [c][00FF00][Th-then this time… I mean… the poorest king in the world is… ?][-][/c]
LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_5.korean: [c][00FF00][그, 그럼 이번에는… 그러니까… 세상에서 가장 가난한 왕은…?][-][/c]

LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_50.english: Yes, then let's hurry and finish the mission.
LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_50.korean: 네, 그럼 서둘러 임무를 끝내기로 해요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_51.english: Because we can't leave Ur alone for long.
LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_51.korean: 우르를 오랫동안 혼자 둘 수는 없으니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_7.english: [c][00FF00][It's minimum wage! Uh, how is it…?][-][/c]

LastCorruptedRecord3-9ED_10.english: Anyway, let's eat quickly! Eat, gather your strength, hang in there, hang in there, and get out of here!
LastCorruptedRecord3-9ED_10.korean: 아무튼 빨리 먹자! 먹고 힘을 내서 버티고 버텨서 여길 나가는 거야!

LastCorruptedRecord3-9ED_11.english: There must be tons of delicious things outside!
LastCorruptedRecord3-9ED_11.korean: 분명 바깥에는 맛있는 것들이 잔뜩 있을 테니까!

LastCorruptedRecord3-9ED_12.english: Could that really be the case...?

LastCorruptedRecord3-9ED_13.english: Of course! When we get out of here someday, let's all eat something delicious together! How about it?
LastCorruptedRecord3-9ED_13.korean: 물론이지! 언젠가 여길 나가게 되면&n다 같이 맛있는 걸 먹자! 어때?

LastCorruptedRecord3-9ED_15.english: If we all eat together, it will definitely be delicious.
LastCorruptedRecord3-9ED_15.korean: 다 함께 먹는 거라면 분명 맛있을 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord3-9ED_17.english: What? Again? I've really become a meatball fanatic now.
LastCorruptedRecord3-9ED_17.korean: 네? 또 인가요? 이젠 정말 미트볼 마니아가 됐사와요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-9ED_18.english: Of course! There’s no way I would dislike meatballs, right?
LastCorruptedRecord3-9ED_18.korean: 그럼! 미트볼을 내가 싫어할 리가 없잖아?

LastCorruptedRecord3-9ED_19.korean: 미트볼~ 미트볼~ 따끈 따끈 데워진 미트볼~

LastCorruptedRecord3-9ED_22.english: Ur, there's sauce on the corner of your mouth.

LastCorruptedRecord3-9ED_26.english: Aren't you going to eat? Then I'll eat! Yum!
LastCorruptedRecord3-9ED_26.korean: 안 먹어? 그럼 내가 먹는다~ 냠~!

LastCorruptedRecord3-9ED_28.english: That's because you keep spacing out. What are you thinking about so intently?
LastCorruptedRecord3-9ED_28.korean: 계속 멍때리고 있으니까 그렇지.&n뭔 생각을 그렇게 하고 있는 건데?

LastCorruptedRecord3-9ED_30.english: … You know, I’ve never eaten anything delicious since I was little.
LastCorruptedRecord3-9ED_30.korean: …난 말야.&n어렸을 때부터 맛있는 걸 먹어본 적이 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord3-9ED_31.english: Every day, I just forced myself to eat tasteless food simply for the sake of my physiological needs.
LastCorruptedRecord3-9ED_31.korean: 매일 같이 맛없는 음식을 그저 생리활동을 위해 억지로 먹을 뿐이었지.

LastCorruptedRecord3-9ED_32.english: So I always thought about it. How nice would it be to eat delicious food together?
LastCorruptedRecord3-9ED_32.korean: 그래서 항상 생각했어.&n맛있는 음식을 다 같이 먹으면 얼마나 좋을까 하고 말이야.

LastCorruptedRecord3-9ED_33.english: I was sure it would be delicious...

LastCorruptedRecord3-9ED_37.english: If it didn't taste good, I wouldn't be stealing it like this, right?
LastCorruptedRecord3-9ED_37.korean: 맛이 없다면 이렇게 뺐어 먹을 리가 없잖아?

LastCorruptedRecord3-9ED_4.english: It’s true it doesn’t taste good, but I need to eat at least a little bit to have the strength to endure.
LastCorruptedRecord3-9ED_4.korean: 맛없는 건 맞지만, 조금이라도 먹어야 버틸 힘이 나지.

LastCorruptedRecord3-9ED_5.english: … How much longer do I have to hold out? It’s been a long time since I came here...
LastCorruptedRecord3-9ED_5.korean: …언제까지 버텨야 하는 걸까?&n여기에 온 지도 오래 지났는데...

LastCorruptedRecord3-9ED_6.english: I want to go home now... I want to see Mom...
LastCorruptedRecord3-9ED_6.korean: 이제 그만 집으로 돌아가고 싶어…&n엄마를 보고 싶어…

LastCorruptedRecord3-9ED_7.english: If you wait… if you keep holding out, you will definitely be able to go back. Because they promised to send you back once all the experiments are over.
LastCorruptedRecord3-9ED_7.korean: 기다리면… 계속 버티다 보면 분명 돌아갈 수 있어.&n모든 실험이 끝나면 돌려보내 준다고 약속했으니까.

LastCorruptedRecord3-9ED_8.english: Fnel, don't you miss your mom?

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_10.english: Are you asking because you don't know? I said meatball! Meatball!

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_12.english: Meatballs? That's it! Packs of protein! The stuff I used to eat every day when I was locked up in the 'quarantine'...
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_12.korean: 미트볼이면 그거잖아! 단백질 덩어리!&n'격리소'에 갇혀 있을 떄 맨날 먹던 건데…

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_13.english: I consider meatballs to be a tasty food...

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_14.english: What? Meatballs are delicious? Did you lose your sense of taste, or is your brain messed up?
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_14.korean: 뭐? 미트볼이 맛있어? 혀의 감각이 사라진 거야, 아니면 뇌가 맛이 간 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_15.english: If you received meatballs as a gift from the master you served your whole life, wouldn't you think, 'Ah, my master says he doesn't need me anymore. What is the point of living any longer!' and take your own life?
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_15.korean: 평생을 모시던 주인에게 선물로 미트볼을 받으면 '아, 주인께서 내가 필요 없다고 하시는구나 더 살아 무엇하겠더냐!' 하고 스스로 목숨을 끊을걸?

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_16.english: I don't think it's that bad...

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_17.english: Stop talking nonsense... Here, have a bite!
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_17.korean: 이상한 소리 하지 마시고... 자, 여기 한입 드셔보시와요!

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_18.english: Ugh! Hey! What are you putting in my mouth! I mean, I… huh?
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_18.korean: 읍! 야! 내 입에 뭘 넣는 거야! 그러니까 나는… 어?

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_2.english: Wouldn't that be okay? It should be enough just to lift your spirits.
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_2.korean: 괜찮지 않을까요?&n기분을 내는 정도로는 충분할 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_20.english: It's cold because it hasn't been heated up yet, but it's still delicious, isn't it?
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_20.korean: 아직 데우지 않아서 차갑지만 그래도 맛있지요?

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_21.english: But what I know is… … no, I’ll try it just one more time.
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_21.korean: 하지만 내가 아는 건…&n…아니, 한 번만 더 먹어볼래.

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_24.english: It's not a lump made of carbohydrates and protein... It's not a lump meant to maintain physiological functions...
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_24.korean: 탄수화물과 단백질로 이루어진 덩어리가 아니야…&n생리현상을 유지하기 위한 덩어리가 아니야…

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_25.english: Nobody gets angry if you don't eat. As for the people who force-feed… well… they are here too, though…
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_25.korean: 먹지 않는다고 화내는 사람도 없어.&n입에 억지로 집어넣는 사람…은... 여기도 있지만…

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_27.english: What's with that reaction... Is there another meatball besides this one?
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_27.korean: 뭔가요, 그 반응은… 이거 말고 다른 미트볼이 있는 건가요?

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_28.english: … No, there is no such thing.

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_3.english: What are you guys doing here?

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_30.english: Fnel, if you don't mind, wouldn't you like to eat together? It will taste even better if we heat it up and eat it warm.
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_30.korean: 에프넬 씨, 괜찮으면 다 같이 먹지 않을래요?&n데워서 따뜻하게 먹으면 더 맛있을 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_32.english: Well, fine! If you guys keep begging and pleading like that, then I guess I have no choice!
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_32.korean: 뭐, 좋아! 너희가 사정~ 사정~ 하면서 그렇게까지 말한다면야 어쩔 수 없지!

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_33.english: There is no reason to refuse food that was gone to such trouble to prepare!
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_33.korean: 기껏 마련해 준 음식을 거절할 이유는 없으니까!

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_34.english: Hehe, alright then, I'll warm it up for you right now—
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_34.korean: 후후, 네 그럼 지금 따뜻하게 데워드릴ㅡ

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_35.english: Tiamat, please wait a moment. The Commander has just called.
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_35.korean: 티아멧, 잠깐 기다려주세요.&n지금 사령관에게 호출이 들어왔사와요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_38.english: They say Iron Bugs have appeared. They asked the three of us to handle it.
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_38.korean: 철충이 나타났다고 해요.&n저희 셋이서 처리를 부탁하셨사와요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_4.english: Ah, Mr. Fnel. I was preparing food for dinner.
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_4.korean: 아, 에프넬 씨.&n저녁에 먹을 음식을 준비하고 있었어요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_40.english: What!? Then what about the meatballs!

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_41.english: It will taste even better if you eat it after finishing the mission and returning.
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_41.korean: 임무를 끝내고 돌아와서 먹으면 더 맛있을 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_42.english: Why did you have to show up at a time like this! Don't you have even a shred of table manners?
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_42.korean: 하필 이럴 때 나타나는 거야! 식사 예절이라곤 눈곱만큼도 없나?

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_43.english: It's no use complaining, so you'd better leave quickly!

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_44.english: Wait for me, Meatball! I will definitely come back! And eat you all!
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_44.korean: 기다리고 있어 미트볼! 내가 반드시 돌아와서! 널 전부 먹어 줄 테니까!

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_46.english: Delicious meatballs~ They don't taste good when they cool down~

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_47.english: Didn't you hate it just a moment ago?
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_47.korean: 조금 전까지만 해도 엄청 싫어하시지 않으셨나요?

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_48.english: Hehe, let's hurry up and finish the mission and go back.
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_48.korean: 후후, 서둘러 임무를 끝내고 돌아가도록 해요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_49.english: Alright, then let's hurry up and finish this! The meatballs are waiting for us!
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_49.korean: 좋아, 그럼 빨리 끝내러 가자고! 미트볼이 우릴 기다리고 있으니까!

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_5.english: Food? Ah, come to think of it, you said you'd provide a place to sleep and something to eat, right?
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_5.korean: 음식?&n아~ 그러고 보니 잘 곳이랑 먹을 건 마련해 준다고 했지?

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_51.english: … Excuse me, Mr. Fnel. May I ask you one question before we start?
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_51.korean: …저기, 에프넬 씨.&n시작하기 전에 질문 하나만 해도 괜찮을까요?

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_52.english: Huh? What is it? Why the sudden serious expression.
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_52.korean: 응? 뭔데?&n갑자기 그런 진지한 표정을 하고.

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_53.english: You mentioned 'quarantine' a moment ago, and considering the tattoo on your thigh... the place where Fnel was before... could it be...
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_53.korean: 조금 전에 '격리소'라는 말을 하셨는데 허벅지에 있는 문신도 그렇고...&n에프넬 씨가 이전에 있었던 곳은… 혹시...

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_56.english: There are some things in this world that are never good to know. They say ignorance is bliss, right?
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_56.korean: 세상에는 알아서 하나 좋을 거 없는 일도 있는 거야.&n모르는 게 약이라잖아?

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_57.english: I mean, my case is that kind of thing.

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_58.english: So don't try to get deeply involved with me for no reason.
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_58.korean: 그러니까 괜히 나랑 깊게 엮이려고 하지 마.

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_6.english: So, shall we see what my new wallet has prepared? What kind of food is it?
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_6.korean: 자~ 과연 내 새 지갑이 뭘 준비해 줬는지 볼까?&n어떤 음식이야?

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_60.english: I don't know if you know this, but...

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_61.english: Ur and I were previously test subjects being experimented on at the research institute.
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_61.korean: 저와 우르는 이전, 연구소에서 실험 당하는 실험체 였어요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_62.english: If we failed to properly achieve our objectives or made even a single mistake during a simulated operation, it was never simply overlooked.
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_62.korean: 제대로 목표를 달성하지 못하거나, 모의 작전 중에 실수라도 하면 항상 그냥 넘어가는 일이 없었죠.

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_63.english: Still, the physical pain was fine. After all, I was built to be strong. The pain was momentary, and wounds could be healed over time.
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_63.korean: 그래도 신체의 고통은 괜찮았어요. 저는 튼튼하게 만들어졌으니까요.&n고통은 한순간이고, 상처는 시간이 지나면 치료받을 수 있었어요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_64.english: However… if I couldn’t produce results, other… bioroids were sacrificed.
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_64.korean: 하지만… 제가 성과를 내지 못하면, 다른… 바이오로이드 분들이 희생되었어요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_66.english: Since we couldn't let the experimental machine, which incorporated all our technology, break down, we utilized others to obtain data and feedback.
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_66.korean: 모든 기술을 집약시켜 만든 실험기가 부서져 버리면 안 되니까, 데이터와 피드백을 얻기 위해 다른 분들을 이용한 거죠.

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_67.english: It was a terrible time when I wasn't even allowed to close my eyes or cover my ears, just unable to do anything.
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_67.korean: 눈을 감는 것도, 귀를 막는 것도 허락받지 못하고, 그저 아무것도 할 수 없는 끔찍한... 나날이었어요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_68.english: And as time passed… the humans disappeared, I became an Orca resistance fighter and fought, and met the commander.
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_68.korean: 그리고 시간이 흘러… 인간님들이 사라지고, 오르카 저항군이 되어 싸우고, 사령관을 만났어요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_69.english: At first, I didn't trust the Commander. I didn't think there would be a human being who would treat me so warmly.
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_69.korean: 처음에는 사령관을 믿지 않았어요.&n저를 따뜻하게 대해주는 인간님이 계실 거라고는 생각하지 않았으니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_70.english: Even so, the Commander did not give up and treated not only me but everyone warmly.
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_70.korean: 그래도 사령관님은 포기하지 않고 저뿐만이 아니라 모두에게 따뜻하게 대해주셨어요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_71.english: I don't think about those nightmarish days anymore. Because now the Commander... the Strikers members... and everyone in Orca are here.
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_71.korean: 이제 저는 악몽 같던 그때의 일을 떠올리지 않아요.&n지금은 사령관님이… 스트라이커즈 멤버가… 오르카 모두가 있으니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_72.english: Hmm, really? That's a relief. That you won't think about it anymore.
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_72.korean: 흐응, 그래? 그거 다행이네.&n떠올리지 않게 돼서.

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_73.english: So, that's the end of the story, right? Then I'm going first.
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_73.korean: 자, 이야기는 끝난 거지?&n그럼 나 먼저 간다.

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_8.english: Hey, where's that guy? He said he'd provide a place to sleep and food, but is this how he treats me?
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_8.korean: 야, 그 자식 어딨어.&n잘 곳이랑 먹을 걸 마련해 준다더니 이 따위로 대접을 해?

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_10.english: In that case, you are no longer my friend. You are merely an outsider who forces sacrifices upon me.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_10.korean: 그렇다면 넌 더 이상 내 친구가 아니야.&n그건 단지 희생을 강요하는 타인일 뿐이야.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_11.english: Because… it’s practically the same as you telling me to ‘give my body back and die.’ I don’t want to give it back to someone like that.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_11.korean: 왜냐면… 너도 나한테 '몸을 돌려주고 죽어버려'라고 말하고 있는 거나 마찬가지니까.&n그런 사람한테 돌려주고 싶지는 않아.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_13.english: Do you have something to say?

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_16.english: Yeah, that's right. I'm just the residue left inside you.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_16.korean: 그래, 맞아. 난 그저 네 안에 남아 있던 찌꺼기일 뿐이지.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_17.english: You were much more selfish than I thought. If the real Aruel had asked for your body, would you have refused even then?
LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_17.korean: 넌 생각보다도 훨씬 이기적인 녀석이었네.&n만약 진짜 아루엘이 몸을 달라 했다면, 그때도 거절했을까?

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_18.english: If it were Aruel, he would surely have said something like this: 'Let's find a way to live together until the end.' 'Don't die and leave me alone.'
LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_18.korean: 아루엘이라면 분명 이렇게 말했을 거야.&n‘끝까지 함께 살아갈 방법을 찾자.’&n‘날 혼자 두고 죽지 말라.’고…

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_19.english: But you spoke as if you didn't care what happened to someone like me. So I knew.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_19.korean: 하지만 넌 나 따위 어떻게 돼도 상관없다는 식으로 말했어. 그래서 알 수 있었어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_2.english: I have been waiting in this cold and lonely place. Did you find a way to return your body? Come on, return your body to me.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_2.korean: 난 이 차갑고 쓸쓸한 곳에서 계속 기다리고 있었어.&n몸을 돌려줄 방법을 찾은 거야? 어서, 나에게 몸을 돌려줘.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_20.english: You're just a cat that can't think for itself... If they ask for your body, just give it to them.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_20.korean: 혼자서 아무것도 생각하지 못하는 고양이 주제에… 그냥 몸을 달라고 하면 주기나 하라고.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_21.english: No. This body is precious to me, given to me by Aruel. I wouldn't give it away carelessly.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_21.korean: 싫어. 이 몸은 아루엘이 준 소중한 몸이야.&n함부로 주거나 하지 않아.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_22.english: Then what are you going to do? Are you going to get rid of me because I'm the Soul Junk you hate?
LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_22.korean: 그럼 어떻게 할 거야?&n네가 증오하는 소울정크니까 날 없애려고?

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_23.english: Now, you want to kill me, don't you? You hate me, don't you? Go ahead, bark all you want. I'm the Soul Junk who killed Aruel.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_23.korean: 자, 날 죽이고 싶은 거잖아? 내가 미운 거잖아? 어디 얼마든지 짖어봐.&n난 아루엘을 죽인 소울정크니까.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_24.english: I don't really intend to get angry.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_25.english: … What are you talking about? Are you saying you won't hate Soul Junk?
LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_25.korean: …무슨 소리 하는 거야?&n소울정크를 증오하지 않겠다는 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_26.english: I still hate Soul Junk. I will forever… hate Soul Junk.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_26.korean: 소울정크를 싫어하는 건 똑같아.&n난 앞으로도 영원히… 소울정크를 증오할 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_27.english: Then it's all the same thing in the end! It just means you hate me, a Soul Junk!
LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_27.korean: 그렇다면 결국 똑같은 얘기잖아! 결국 소울정크인 날 증오한다는 얘기잖아!

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_28.english: No matter how much I hate and despise it, I am still Soul Junk in the end. I kept insisting I was a cat... but the truth doesn't change.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_28.korean: 내가 아무리 싫어하고 증오해도 나도 결국 소울정크야.&n고양이라고 계속 우겼지만… 그래도 사실은 변하지 않아.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_29.english: So you're going to accept it? After denying it so much all this time? And now you're saying it's okay?
LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_29.korean: 그래서 받아들이겠다고?&n지금까지 그렇게나 부정해 왔으면서? 이제 와서 괜찮다고?

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_30.english: You must kill more Soul Junk and hate more than anyone else. Know that as long as you are Soul Junk, you too cannot be forgiven!
LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_30.korean: 넌 그 누구보다도 소울정크를 더 많이 죽이고, 더 많이 증오해야 돼.&n네가 소울정크인 이상, 너 또한 용서받을 수 없다는 걸 알라고!

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_31.english: Still, Aruel… liked that Soul Junk. She liked me, even though I was Soul Junk.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_31.korean: 그래도, 아루엘은… 그 소울정크를 좋아해 줬어.&n소울정크였던 나를 좋아해 줬어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_33.english: I gave her the name Chii and stayed with her all the time.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_33.korean: 치이라는 이름을 주고, 계속 함께 있어 줬어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_34.english: Then it’s not just a simple Soul Junk. It’s Aruel’s friend named Chi.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_34.korean: 그렇다면 그건 단순한 소울정크가 아니야.&n치이라는 이름을 가진 아루엘의 친구야.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_35.english: The friend Aruel liked... Chii. There is no reason for me to hate her myself.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_35.korean: 아루엘이 좋아한 친구… 치이를.&n나 스스로 싫어해야 할 이유는 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_36.english: So, did you reach that conclusion in the end?

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_37.english: Even a cat that can't do anything on its own must eventually start to resemble humans little by little if it mingles with them. After yearning for it so much, it has become at least a bit more human.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_37.korean: 혼자선 아무것도 못하는 고양이라도, 사람 사이에 섞이다 보면 결국 조금씩 닮아가는 거겠지.&n그렇게나 열망하더니, 조금이나마 인간다워졌네.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_38.english: I was planning to devour you if your soul energy shrank due to self-loathing. But with this, I guess I'll be the one shrinking instead?
LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_38.korean: 네가 자기혐오로 소울에너지가 작아져 버리면 그대로 잡아먹어 버리려고 했는데.&n이걸로 작아지는 건 내 쪽이 되려나?

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_39.english: So you know your place, huh? Then just keep your mouth shut and breathe quietly.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_39.korean: 그래도 주제는 아는구나?&n그럼 이제 조용히 입 다문 채 숨만 쉬고 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_4.english: What's wrong? Why aren't you saying anything?
LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_4.korean: 무슨 일이야? 왜 아무 말도 하지 않는 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_40.english: Hahaha... Yeah, I guess that’s how it should be for now. But I won’t keep my mouth shut and my head down forever.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_40.korean: 후후후… 그래, 지금은 그래야겠지.&n하지만 언제까지고 입 다문 채 고개 숙이고 있지는 않을 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_41.english: Come find me anytime. I don't care about you at all anymore!
LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_41.korean: 언제든 다시 찾아와.&n이제 너 따위 전혀 신경 쓰지 않으니까!

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_42.english: Yeah, right! You're precious, so don't die somewhere weird! Well then, bye bye, goodbye. Chii Aruel.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_42.korean: 응, 그래! 소중한 몸이니까 어디 이상한 데서 죽지나 마!&n그럼, 바이 바이 잘 가. 치이 아루엘.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_43.english: Judging by your expression, it looks like it was resolved well.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_44.english: Yeah! Not completely, but I solved it for now!
LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_44.korean: 응! 완전히는 아니지만, 그래도 일단은 해결했어!

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_45.english: Thank you, Commander. For holding onto me... and for letting me meet Ferro and Poi.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_45.korean: 사령관, 고마워.&n나를 붙잡아주고… 페로랑 포이를 만나게 해줘서.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_46.english: If it weren't for the three of you, I probably wouldn't have been able to come back like this again.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_46.korean: 세 사람이 없었더라면 난 아마… 다시는 이렇게 돌아오지 못했을 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_47.english: It probably isn't completely over. The Aruel you saw will appear again someday. You'll have to keep fighting against it.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_47.korean: 완전히 끝난 건 아닐 거야. 네가 본 아루엘은 언젠가 또 나타날 테니까.&n앞으로도 계속 맞서야 하겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_48.english: But it's okay! I'm not alone anymore! I have my friends Perodo, Poido, and the Commander by my side!
LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_48.korean: 그래도 괜찮아!&n난 이제 혼자가 아니니까!&n내 옆엔 친구인 페로도, 포이도, 그리고 사령관도 있으니까!

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_49.english: Friends are supposed to help each other, right?

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_50.english: So please make sure to help me when I'm having a hard time! In return, I'll… help out for everyone anytime!
LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_50.korean: 그러니까 내가 힘들 땐 꼭 도와줘!&n대신 나도… 모두를 위해 언제든 도와줄게!

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_51.english: I'm really glad you said that.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_52.english: I look forward to working with you in the future, Chii.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_53.english: Yeah! I'm Chii Aruel! … Because I'm a cat!

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_56.english: Player: Commander Character: Chii Aruel Ending Branch: Achieved.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_56.korean: 플레이어 : 사령관&n인물 : 치이 아루엘&n엔딩 분기 : 달성 완료.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_57.english: Final record collection ended. All records have been collected.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_57.korean: 마지막 기록 수집 종료&n모든 기록을 수집하였습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_58.english: Loads ending data after achieving clear conditions.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_59.english: Commander, thank you for your hard work so far.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_6.english: She told me to run away, and told me not to worry about her. Even while dying from an attack by Soul Junk, Aruel worried about me until the very end.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_6.korean: 나한테 도망치라고 했어, 자기는 신경 쓰지 말라고도 했어.&n소울정크에게 공격당해 죽어가는 와중에도 아루엘은 끝까지 내 걱정을 해줬어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_60.english: <Chii Aruel, Sword God of Screaming Desire> END.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_61.english: Continued in the epilogue of <The Last Tainted Record>

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_7.english: So... Aruel definitely isn't asking me for his body. I'm going to believe the last version of Aruel I saw.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_7.korean: 그러니까… 아루엘은 분명 나한테 몸을 달라고 말하지 않아.&n난, 내가 마지막으로 보았던 아루엘의 모습을 믿을 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_8.english: This is impossible! This is Aruel! It turned black because you stole my body!
LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_8.korean: 말도 안 돼! 이 모습은 아루엘이야!&n검게 변한 건 네가 내 몸을 빼앗았기 때문이잖아!

LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_9.english: Is it really that weird for me to ask for the body you stole? Isn't it only natural to return a body borrowed as a friend!?
LastCorruptedRecord4-10ED_9.korean: 네가 빼앗은 몸을 달라고 말하는 게 그렇게 이상한 거야?&n친구로서 빌려 간 몸은 돌려주는 게 당연한 거 아니야!?

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_10.english: I've been waiting only for the day you would come find me... so I'll forgive you completely for coming to see me like this!
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_10.korean: 난 네가 찾아오는 날 만을 기다렸으니까...&n이렇게 찾아온 널 얼마든지 용서해 줄게!

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_100.english: That… of course there’s no way that’s true!

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_101.english: Yes, the same goes for the other person. That is, if they are truly still 'friends'.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_102.english: Then… what on earth is this? Are you saying Aruel said that because she doesn't want to be friends with me anymore?
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_102.korean: 그럼… 대체 뭐야.&n아루엘은 더 이상 나와 친구하고 싶지 않아서 그런 말을 했다는 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_103.english: And the second reason is… can you tell me, Poi?
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_103.korean: 그리고 두 번째 이유는…&n포이 알려줄 수 있겠어?

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_104.english: My companion sisters would never say something like 'please die'! If they did, that guy is an enemy disguised as one of them trying to trick me!
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_104.korean: 컴패니언 언니들이 '죽어달라' 같은 소리를 할 리가 없으니까!&n만약 그런 말을 했다면 그 녀석은 언니로 변장해 날 속이려는 적이야!

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_106.english: Chii, if you really want to be best friends with that Aruel, isn't now the time to be suspicious of the opposite?
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_106.korean: 치이, 당신이 정말로 그 아루엘이라는 분과 둘도 없는 친구로 지내고 싶다면&n지금은 반대로 의심해 봐야 할 때가 아닐까요?

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_107.english: Whether we truly considered each other friends, and whether we could remain friends in the future… and before that, whether that person might be someone else entirely…
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_107.korean: 정말로 서로 친구라고 생각하고 있었던 것인지, 앞으로도 친구로 지낼 수 있는 것인지…&n그리고 그 이전에 그 사람은 혹시나 친구가 아닌 다른 누군가인지를…

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_108.english: … The fact that I doubt it. Looking at Aruel's face, can I really do it?
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_108.korean: …의심한다는 거.&n내가 아루엘의 얼굴을 보면서 정말로 할 수 있을까?

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_109.english: It is something that must be done. It is even more necessary to trust a friend as a friend.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_109.korean: 해야만 하는 일이에요.&n친구를 친구로써 신용하기 위해서라도 더욱이 필요해요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_11.english: So… you can get me out of here now, right? I don't want to be trapped here anymore… please let me out quickly.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_11.korean: 자… 이제 날 여기서 꺼내줄 수 있는 거지?&n더 이상 이곳에 갇혀있고 싶지 않아… 빨리 꺼내줘.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_110.english: I'm not entirely sure, but if it's a hit, I can do it!
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_110.korean: 잘은 모르겠지만 치이라면 할 수 있어!

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_111.english: If that is necessary to stay friends… I’ll give it a try… I’m going to talk to you one more time.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_111.korean: 그것이 친구로써 지내기 위해 필요한 일이라면… 나 해볼게…&n한 번 더 이야기 해볼 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_113.english: For now… I’ve changed my mind a little.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_114.english: So, you're not going to say you'd die for your friend anymore, right?
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_114.korean: 그렇다면 이제 친구를 위해 죽겠다는 말은 안하는 거지?

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_115.english: Yeah, they say what I saw might not have been Aruel, but something pretending to be Aruel. So… I think I need to meet with them one more time to talk.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_115.korean: 응, 내가 보았던 게 아루엘이 아니라 아루엘인 척을 하는 무언가일지도 모른대.&n그래서… 한 번 더 만나서 얘기를 해봐야 할 것 같아.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_116.english: Okay, so you've finally learned about 'doubt'. It seemed like Chii had a tendency to blindly trust others first.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_116.korean: 좋아, 이제야 '의심'을 배우게 됐네.&n치이는 무작정 상대방을 일단 믿고보는 경향이 있는 것 같았어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_117.english: Of course, trusting people and being pure is a good thing. However, it is difficult to live in this world simply as a 'good person'.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_117.korean: 물론 사람을 신용하고 순수한 건 좋은 일이야.&n하지만 이 세상은 그저 '좋은 사람'으로써 살아가기엔 어려움이 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_118.english: If you truly want to live proudly as a human being and do not want to become a puppet who is only used, doubt anyone who tells you to die.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_118.korean: 치이 정말로 인간으로서 당당하게 살아가고, 이용당하기만 하는 꼭두각시가 되고 싶지 않다면 자신을 향해 죽으라는 자는 의심해.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_119.english: Okay, I'll go back to that kid and talk to him now.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_119.korean: 응, 이제 다시 그 아이한테 가서 이야기 해볼 게.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_12.english: I… want to get you out too. But I don’t know how…

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_120.english: Are you sure you'll be okay on your own? I could help you.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_121.english: It's okay. I've already helped enough.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_13.english: So am I supposed to keep being trapped here?
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_13.korean: 그럼 난 계속 여기에 갇혀야 하는 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_15.english: It's so cold... It's so painful... I don't want to be alone in this dark place anymore...
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_15.korean: 너무 추워… 너무 괴로워…&n이 어두운 곳에, 더 이상 혼자 있고 싶지 않아…

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_16.english: Chii, please help me. Let me get out of here.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_16.korean: 치이, 제발 도와줘.&n여기서 나갈 수 있게 해줘.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_17.english: I'm scared... It feels like I'm dying with my eyes open... I feel like someday I'll suddenly lose my ability to see... Why did you leave me here... If only you had let me die, I wouldn't be in this pain...
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_17.korean: 무서워… 눈 뜬 채로 죽어가는 것 같아… 언젠가 갑자기 아무것도 보이지 않게 될 것 같아… 날 왜 여기에 내버려 둔거야… 차라리 죽게 내버려 뒀다면 이렇게 괴롭지 않았을 텐데…

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_19.english: It's okay... there's still... a way.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_2.english: I was definitely fighting Soul Junk… then drawn by a strange voice… into a suddenly appearing void…
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_2.korean: 분명 소울정크와 싸우다가… 이상한 목소리에 이끌려서…&n갑자기 생긴 공백 안으로…

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_20.english: A way? Tell me anything! I can do anything for Aruel!
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_20.korean: 방법? 뭐든 말해줘!&n아루엘을 위해서라면 난 뭐든 할 수 있어!

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_23.english: In that case… give your body back to me. Then I can get out.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_23.korean: 그렇다면… 네 몸을 나에게 돌려줘.&n그러면 난 밖으로 나갈 수 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_24.english: … Are you… returning this body? Then what happens to me?
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_24.korean: …이 몸을… 돌려주는 거야?&n그럼 나는 어떻게 되는 거지?

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_25.english: I don't know either. I might disappear, or instead, I might get trapped where I was... I can't be sure.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_25.korean: 나도 몰라.&n사라질지도, 대신 내가 있던 곳에 갇히게 될지도… 그건 알 수 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_26.english: But… are you going to leave me here just because you’re scared? I want to get out of here… Ugh, please…
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_26.korean: 하지만… 그게 무서워서, 날 여기 두고 갈 거야?&n난 여기서 나가고 싶어… 치이, 제발…

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_28.english: If you want to go outside again, I'll give it back to Aruel. So… don't cry.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_28.korean: 다시 밖으로 나가고 싶다면, 아루엘에게 돌려줄게.&n그러니까… 울지 마.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_3.english: Chii, welcome back. Long time no see.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_30.english: This body has belonged to Aruel from the very beginning. If I have to disappear… that is only natural.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_30.korean: 이 몸은 처음부터 아루엘의 거잖아.&n내가 사라져야 한다면… 그건 당연한 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_32.english: Because I'm Aruel's friend. Because I like him/her... I want to do anything for him/her.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_32.korean: 난 아루엘의 친구니까.&n좋아하니까… 뭐든 해주고 싶어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_33.english: So, Aruel... please stay friends with me. Please... don't hate me.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_33.korean: 그러니까 아루엘… 앞으로도 친구로 지내줘.&n날… 싫어하지 말아 줘.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_34.english: Of course! As long as you return your body… I’ll call you my friend forever!
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_34.korean: 물론이지! 네가 몸을 돌려주기만 한다면…&n난 영원히 널 친구라 부를게!

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_35.english: Then… I’ll definitely find a way to turn you around! Just wait a little longer, Aruel!
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_35.korean: 그럼… 몸을 돌려주는 방법을 꼭 찾아낼게!&n조금만 기다려 줘, 아루엘!

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_36.english: Chii? Why are you making such a frantic face?
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_36.korean: 치이? 왜 그렇게 다급한 얼굴을 하고 있어?

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_37.english: I came because I have something I want to ask.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_38.english: I... I think I can return this body to Aruel. So I want to know how to do it. If you know anything, please let me know.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_38.korean: 나… 아루엘한테 이 몸을 돌려줄 수 있을 것 같아.&n그러니까 돌려주는 방법을 알고 싶어. 아는 게 있다면 알려줘.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_39.english: Returning it to Aruel…? Could you explain in detail what that means? I feel uneasy for some reason.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_39.korean: 아루엘에게 돌려준다…? 그게 무슨 뜻인지, 자세히 설명해 줄 수 있겠어?&n왠지 불안한데.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_40.english: I remembered everything. This body wasn't mine from the beginning. It's Aruel's body.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_40.korean: 나 전부 기억 났어.&n이 몸은 처음부터 내 게 아니었어. 아루엘의 몸이야.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_41.english: Aruel... told me to run away from in front of me. He said he already couldn't live.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_41.korean: 아루엘이… 내 앞에서 도망치라고 했었어.&n자기는 이미 살 수 없다고 말했어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_42.english: I thought I had to save Aruel quickly... so I wanted to become human... That's why...
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_42.korean: 나는 빨리 아루엘을 구해야 한다고 생각해서… 인간이 되고 싶었어..&n난 그래서…

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_43.english: … So you are the Soul Junk who ate Aruel's body to save him from dying.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_43.korean: …넌 죽어가는 아루엘을 구하기 위해, 그 몸을 먹은 소울정크라는 거구나.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_44.english: No! I took it... so I have to give it back.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_44.korean: 아니야! 난 빼앗은 거야… 그러니까 돌려줘야 돼.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_45.english: While investigating the strange void, I met Aruel in a certain space.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_45.korean: 이상 공백을 조사하다가 어느 공간에서 아루엘을 만났어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_46.english: And are you saying that the child demanded you return their body?
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_46.korean: 그리고 그 아이가 너에게 자신의 몸을 돌려달라고 요구했다는 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_47.english: Yeah, I was standing alone in a cold, dark, and lonely space. I was left alone because I took over the body like this.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_47.korean: 응, 차갑고, 어둡고, 쓸쓸한 공간 안에 혼자 서 있었어.&n내가 이렇게 몸을 뺏어버렸기 때문에 혼자 남겨진거야.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_48.english: … If you return it, what happens to Chii?

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_49.english: I'm not sure. Aruel said he didn't know either.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_50.english: I might disappear... or I might end up trapped in that darkness instead. Still... I’ve braced myself.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_50.korean: 사라질 수도 있고… 내가 대신 그 어둠 속에 갇히게 될지도 몰라.&n그래도… 각오는 했어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_51.english: Then Aruel… is your friend, yet he asked you to 'die'?
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_51.korean: 그렇다면 아루엘은… 너의 친구이면서 너에게 '죽으라'는 부탁을 던진 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_52.english: It's not that I'm dying! Of course! Because I took over Aruel's body, Aruel ended up trapped in that space. If she asks for it back, I have to give it back!
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_52.korean: 죽는 게 아니야! 당연한 거야!&n내가 아루엘의 몸을 뺏어서 아루엘이 그 공간에 갇히게 되었으니까.&n돌려 달라고 말한다면 돌려줘야 돼!

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_53.english: That way… Aruel will continue to be my friend…
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_53.korean: 그래야… 아루엘이 계속 나의 친구가 되어줄 테니까…

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_54.english: Chii... I think you misunderstand what a friend is.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_54.korean: 치이… 넌 친구라는 걸 잘못 이해하고 있는 것 같아.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_55.english: Okay, let's do this. Let's put the issue of returning the body aside for a moment. Before that… go ask Ferro what a friend is first.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_55.korean: 좋아, 이렇게 하자.&n몸을 돌려주는 문제는 잠시 미뤄두자.&n그 전에… 페로한테 가서 ‘친구가 뭔지’ 먼저 물어보고 와.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_56.english: I'm not a fool! I know what a friend is!
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_56.korean: 난 바보가 아니야! 친구가 뭔진 알아!

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_57.english: It is true that Chii is an independent and smart cat. However, it is also true that she is completely clueless about the ways of the world.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_57.korean: 치이가 자립심이 강하고 똑똑한 고양이라는 건 맞아.&n하지만 세상 물정을 너무 모른다는 것 또한 사실이야.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_58.english: If you talk to Perona Foi, you will definitely realize that your thoughts are different from others.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_58.korean: 페로나 포이와 얘기해 보면, 분명 네 생각이 남들과 다르단 걸 알게 될 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_59.english: Let's talk about how to turn your body around later.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_59.korean: 몸을 돌려주는 방법은… 그 뒤에 이야기하자.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_6.english: Yes, it's Aruel. I've been waiting for you.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_61.english: Chii? You didn't come here to groom your fur again today, did you?
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_61.korean: 치이? 설마 오늘도 털을 고르러 온 건 아니죠?

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_62.english: No, I came today because I have something I want to ask Ferro.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_62.korean: 아니야, 오늘은 페로에게 묻고 싶은 게 있어서 왔어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_63.english: Ferro, what do you think of a friend?
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_63.korean: 페로, 너는 친구라는 걸 어떻게 생각해?

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_64.english: … Is it another story about friends? I think I'm close with the Orca members, but there aren't many people I can call true friends.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_64.korean: …또 친구 이야기인가요?&n오르카 대원들과는 친하다고 생각하지만, 진정한 친구라 할 만한 사람은 많지 않아요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_65.english: If I had to say... wouldn't it be a relationship where we help each other?
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_65.korean: 굳이 말하자면… 서로 도와주는 관계 아닐까요?

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_66.english: I think a friend is someone who holds your hand when you're having a hard time, pats your back when you want to cry, and laughs with you when something good happens.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_66.korean: 힘들 땐 손을 잡아주고, 울고 싶을 땐 곁에서 등을 두드려 주고.&n기쁜 일이 있으면 함께 웃는 게 친구라고 생각해요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_67.english: Then I guess I should help Aruel too since she's having a hard time, right?
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_67.korean: 그럼 나도 아루엘이 힘들어하니까 도와줘야 하는 거겠지?

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_68.english: Aruel? … Chii, that’s your name, isn’t it? I’m not entirely sure, but if a friend is having a hard time, it’s only right to help them, isn’t it?
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_68.korean: 아루엘? …치이, 그건 네 이름이잖아요?&n잘은 모르겠지만, 힘든 친구라면 당연히 도와주는 게 맞겠죠.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_69.english: … In that case, even if it means sacrificing my life—

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_7.english: On this empty floor… unable to even sleep… I had to just stare endlessly.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_7.korean: 아무것도 없는 이 바닥에서… 잠들지도 못한 채…&n끝없이 바라만 보고 있어야 했어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_70.english: Wait! Just a moment! Life? Why is that suddenly becoming a topic of conversation!?
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_70.korean: 잠깐! 잠깐만요! 목숨이라니, 왜 갑자기 그런 얘기가 되는 거예요!?

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_71.english: It is true that I am helping, but asking me to sacrifice my life is a different matter! Please tell me in detail what happened.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_71.korean: 도와주는 건 맞지만, 목숨을 버리라는 건 달라요!&n무슨 일이 있었는지 자세히 말해 주세요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_72.english: Chii explained to Ferro about Aruel, whom she met in the abnormal void.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_72.korean: 치이는 페로에게 이상공백에서 만난 아루엘에 대해 설명했다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_73.english: … So that happened. But I still can't understand risking one's life.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_73.korean: …그런 일이 있었군요.&n하지만 역시 목숨을 거는 건 납득할 수 없어요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_74.english: Why? I just want to help a friend, so what's the problem?
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_74.korean: 왜? 난 친구를 돕고 싶을 뿐인데, 뭐가 문제야?

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_75.english: told you, didn't I? Friends help each other. But someone who asks you to die is no longer a friend.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_75.korean: 제가 말씀드렸죠? 친구는 서로 돕는 거라고.&n하지만 ‘죽어달라’고 요구하는 사람은 이미 친구가 아니에요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_76.english: The Orca members risk their lives fighting for their master, but that is their own choice; no one should force them to do so.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_76.korean: 오르카 대원들은 주인님을 위해 목숨을 걸고 싸우지만,&n그건 스스로 선택하는 거지 누군가가 강요해서는 안 돼요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_77.english: … But I took that child's body. Then shouldn't I give it back?
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_77.korean: …하지만 난 그 아이의 몸을 빼앗았어.&n그렇다면 돌려줘야 하지 않아?

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_78.english: In that case… that person named Aruel no longer considers Chii a friend.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_78.korean: 그렇다면… 그 아루엘이라는 사람은 치이를 더 이상 친구라 여기지 않는 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_8.english: I'm sorry... I remembered everything... Because I couldn't protect you, in this state...
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_8.korean: 미안해… 전부 기억났어…&n내가 지켜주지 못해서, 이런 모습으로…

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_80.english: …Would you come with me for a moment? I’m not really keen on it, but that child will give me a definite answer regarding this matter.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_80.korean: …잠깐 따라오시겠어요?&n내키지는 않지만 이런 일이라면 그 아이가 확실하게 대답해 줄 테니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_81.english: Ferro-nee? Chii? What's going on between the two of you?
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_81.korean: 페로 언니? 치이? 둘이 같이 무슨 일이야?

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_82.english: Poi, I have an important question. Please answer seriously.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_82.korean: 포이, 중요한 질문이 있어. 진지하게 대답해줘.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_84.english: Can Poy die in place of the Companion sisters?
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_84.korean: 포이는 컴패니언 자매를 위해서라면 대신 죽어줄 수 있어?

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_85.english: Of course. I wouldn't hesitate if it meant I could save them. Because now, my companion sisters are precious to me.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_85.korean: 물론이에요. 저는 언니들을 구할 수만 있다면 망설이지 않을 거예요.&n이제 컴패니언 언니들은 저에게 소중한 존재니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_86.english: That's exactly the same as me! So that means I have no problems either, right?
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_86.korean: 나랑 똑같잖아! 그럼 나도 아무 문제 없다는 거지?

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_88.english: I'll change the question, Poi. This time, if your companion sisters asked you to 'die' in their place... what would you do?
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_88.korean: 질문을 바꿀게요 포이.&n이번엔 컴패니언 언니들이 포이에게 자기 대신 '죽어달라고' 말한다면… 어떻게 할 건가요?

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_9.english: It's okay. At least you came, even if it's just like this. The time spent waiting doesn't matter.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_90.english: Huh...? Why on earth? What's different from earlier?
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_90.korean: 응…? 도대체 왜? 아까랑 뭐가 다른 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_91.english: Because I know exactly what kind of people you sisters are!
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_91.korean: 그야 저는 언니들이 어떤 분들인지 잘 알고 있으니까요!

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_92.english: What do you mean? If you really want it, I could grant it for you.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_92.korean: 그게 무슨 말이야?&n언니가 정말 바란다면 그걸 들어 줄 수도 있잖아.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_94.english: I used Poi's older sister as an example, but friends are people who rely on each other. However, if one side unilaterally suggests sacrifice, that is not a friendship but closer to a relationship of exploitation.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_94.korean: 포이에게는 언니를 예시로 들었지만 친구는 서로에게 의지하는 존재에요.&n그런데 한쪽이 일방적으로 희생을 권유한다면, 그건 친구가 아니라 이용 관계에 가까워요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_95.korean: 하, 하지만 치이는 아루엘의 몸을 빼앗았는 걸!

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_96.english: But Chii ended up like that because she wanted to protect Aruel, who was dying right before her eyes, didn't she?
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_96.korean: 하지만 치이는 눈앞에서 죽어가는 아루엘을 지키고 싶어서 그렇게 된 거잖아요?

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_97.english: There are probably two reasons why Poi said she would attack her older sister, who had asked her to die for her just a moment ago.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_97.korean: 조금 전 포이가 자신을 위해 죽어달라고 한 언니를 공격하겠다고 한 이유는 두 가지 일거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_98.english: The first reason is that asking her to die for her means she no longer considers her a sister. If she genuinely wishes for her to die, then at that point, they are no longer sisters.
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_98.korean: 첫 번째는 자신을 위해 죽어달라고 말했다는 건 더 이상 자신을 동생이라고 생각하지 않기 때문이에요. 진심으로 죽어버리길 바란다면, 그 시점에서 이미 자매가 아닌 거죠.

LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_99.english: Chii, try to think about it from the opposite perspective. If you were Chii, would you ask that person named Aruel to die for you?
LastCorruptedRecord4-10OP_99.korean: 치이가 반대로 생각해 보세요.&n만약 치이라면, 그 아루엘이라는 분에게 자길 위해서 죽어달라고 부탁할 건가요?

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_1.english: Despite the twists and turns, I cleared all the records in this long, long virtual reality game... but...
LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_1.korean: - 우여곡절이 있었지만, 길고도 긴 가상 현실 게임의 모든 기록을 클리어… 했건만…

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_10.english: A record that has not disappeared…

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_11.english: Doctor, could you help me access that record?
LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_11.korean: 닥터, 그 기록에 접속할 수 있도록 도와줄 수 있을까?

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_12.english: Of course. But… what’s in there?
LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_12.korean: 물론이지. 하지만… 거기에 뭐가 있는 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_13.english: Speaking from a gamer's instinct, it's not over yet. I have a feeling there is still work to be done.
LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_13.korean: 게이머의 감으로 말하자면, 아직 끝이 아니야.&n해야 할 일이 남았다는 느낌이 들어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_14.english: Then… this really will be the last time. Finish everything and come back, Oppa.
LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_14.korean: 그럼… 이번엔 정말 마지막이겠네.&n전부 끝내고 돌아와, 오빠.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_15.english: Leave it to me. Then, I'll be back.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_17.english: With the doctor's last words, I entered virtual reality again.
LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_17.korean: - 닥터의 마지막 말과 함께, 나는 다시 가상 현실로 들어갔다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_19.english: - Is there… no one here. Since the game has been cleared, everyone must have disappeared.
LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_19.korean: - 사람은… 아무도 없나.&n게임이 클리어 되었으니 전부 사라진 거겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_2.english: You're saying the final clear ending is blocked?

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_20.english: - But the fact that this place still remains is…
LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_20.korean: - 하지만 이곳이 여전히 남아 있다는 건…

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_21.english: have been waiting for you, Commander.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_23.english: ...This is the second time we've met in person like this. You looked different back then, though.
LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_23.korean: .…이렇게 직접 만나는 건 두 번째네요.&n그땐 지금과는 다른 모습이었지만요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_25.english: This is not my true form. It is merely the shape of one of the entities within the data.
LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_25.korean: 이건 제 본래의 모습이 아닙니다.&n데이터 속 존재 중 하나의 형상일 뿐이죠.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_26.english: So that means you are the administrator of this game.
LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_26.korean: 그렇다는건 네가 이 게임의 관리자라는 거군.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_27.english: My official name is 'Augmented Reality Intelligence Assistant,' commonly known as 'ARIA.' I would appreciate it if you called me Aria.
LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_27.korean: 저의 정식 명칭은 'Augmented Reality Intelligence Assistant (증강 현실 지능형 조력자)'&n통칭 'ARIA'입니다. 아리아라고 불러주시면 감사하겠습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_28.english: It seems you were aware of my existence.
LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_28.korean: 아무래도 저의 존재를 알고 계셨던 모양이군요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_29.english: Given the caliber of the game, it wouldn't be strange at all to have an AI managing it. Besides, I kept getting the feeling that things were going unusually well.
LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_29.korean: 이 정도의 게임이니까 관리하는 인공지능이 있어도 전혀 이상할 게 없지.&n게다가 이상할 정도로 형편 좋게 흘러간다는 느낌을 계속 받고 있었으니까.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_3.english: Yeah, I checked, and there are a total of eight records saved in this game. You have eight records of clearing it, too. In other words, you have perfectly finished every stage.
LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_3.korean: 응, 확인해 봤는데 이 게임에 저장되어 있는 기록은 총 여덟 개야.&n오빠가 클리어 한 기록도 여덟 개. 즉, 모든 스테이지를 완벽히 끝낸 상태지.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_30.english: It's as if someone is secretly helping you.
LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_30.korean: 마치 누군가가 몰래 도와주고 있는 것처럼 말이지.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_31.english: You are amazing, as expected. I am so glad that you are the first and last person to play this game.
LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_31.korean: 역시 대단하시네요.&n이 게임을 플레이하는 처음이자 마지막 사람이 당신이어서 정말 다행입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_32.english: I guess I was the first player.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_33.english: This game is designed to allow players to meet characters in virtual reality, build relationships, and grow together.
LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_33.korean: 이 게임은 플레이어가 가상 현실 속 인물들과 만나 인연을 쌓으며 함께 성장해 나가도록 설계된 게임입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_34.english: Therefore, the protagonists are created in an unfinished state, each harboring their own problems. The player's ultimate goal is to solve these issues and complete the protagonists.
LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_34.korean: 그렇기 때문에 등장하는 주인공들은 저마다 문제를 안고 있는 미완성 상태로 제작되었습니다.&n그 문제를 해결하며 주인공들을 완성시켜 나가는 것이 플레이어의 궁극적 목표인 것이죠.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_35.english: But when the game was finished…

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_36.english: Does that mean all the players are gone?

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_37.english: Yes, by the time the game was completed, there were no more humans left to play. However, Master did not give up until the very end.
LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_37.korean: 네, 게임이 완성되었을 때는 플레이할 인류가 더 이상 남아 있지 않았습니다.&n하지만, 주인님께서는 마지막까지 포기하지 않으셨습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_38.english: He believed that someday, someone would surely appear to guide these incomplete children to reach completion. For the sake of the children who have not yet seen the light of the world.
LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_38.korean: 언젠가 반드시 미완성인 아이들을 완성에 도달하도록 이끌어 줄 누군가가 나타나리라 믿으셨습니다. 아직 세상의 빛을 보지 못한 아이들을 위해서.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_39.english: And after many years, Commander, you have appeared.
LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_39.korean: 그리고 오랜 세월이 지나 사령관님, 당신이 나타나주셨습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_4.english: If you've cleared all the stages, the final clear ending should naturally appear. It's strange that it's not showing up, isn't it? So I looked into what happened.
LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_4.korean: 모든 스테이지를 클리어했다면 당연히 최종 클리어 엔딩이 나와야 할 텐데.&n그 엔딩이 나오지 않는 건 뭔가 이상하잖아? 그래서 어떻게 된 일인지 알아봤지.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_40.english: Thank you. Thank you for playing this game. Thank you for leading everyone.
LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_40.korean: 감사드립니다.&n이 게임을 플레이해 주셔서. 모두를 이끌어주셔서.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_41.english: Please continue to take good care of these children.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_42.english: Aria held out a shining sphere.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_44.english: This is the clear reward for this game. It is a seed containing the genetic data of the protagonists you have met so far.
LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_44.korean: 이 게임의 클리어 보상입니다.&n지금까지 당신이 만났던 주인공들의 유전자 데이터가 담긴 씨앗입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_45.english: It is also proof that I have completed beings that were incomplete. Please accept it.
LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_45.korean: 미완성이었던 존재들을 완성시킨 증거이기도 하죠.&n부디 받아주세요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_46.english: I'll take it. Thank you, Aria.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_47.english: So now… what about you? What’s going to happen to this game from now on?
LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_47.korean: 그럼 이제… 너는? 앞으로 이 게임은 어떻게 되는 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_48.english: That is the end of my role.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_49.english: All game data will be deleted soon. The process has already started.
LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_49.korean: 게임의 모든 데이터는 곧 삭제될 예정이에요.&n이미 프로세스가 시작됐습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_5.english: So, does that mean the ending was intentionally blocked so it wouldn't appear...?
LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_5.korean: 그 결과 엔딩이 나오지 않도록 고의적으로 막혀 있었다는 건가…

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_50.english: - Let's look around. The sky, the land, and the grass blanket camp began to slowly scatter into fragments of light.
LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_50.korean: - 주변들 둘러보자 하늘과 땅, 그리고 잔디이불 캠프가 서서히 빛의 조각으로 흩어지기 시작했다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_51.english: Well then, I’ll say my final goodbyes. Thank you for playing, Commander.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_53.english: After receiving the reward for clearing the game, I safely returned to reality.
LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_53.korean: - 게임 클리어 보수를 받은 나는 무사히 현실로 돌아왔다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_54.english: The genetic seed data is all safe. If this is true, we should be able to produce everyone as bioroids.
LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_54.korean: 유전자 씨앗 데이터, 전부 무사해.&n이게 진짜라면 전원 바이오로이드로 제작이 가능할 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_55.english: And about the game data... I'm sorry, Oppa... it's all been deleted.
LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_55.korean: 그리고 게임 데이터 말인데… 미안해 오빠… 전부 삭제됐어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_56.english: I tried to stop it somehow... but it wasn't enough.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_58.english: It's a game made by an extraordinary developer from the very beginning. Even if it had been the alpha or beta, they definitely wouldn't have been able to stop it.
LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_58.korean: 애초에 처음부터 범상치 않은 개발자가 만든 게임이잖아.&n알파나 베타였어도 분명 막지 못했을 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_59.english: Ah, but at least I succeeded in backing it up safely.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_6.english: Yeah... I tried to figure it out somehow, but access is blocked, so I think it would be difficult unless you are an expert in this field.
LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_6.korean: 응… 어떻게든 해결해 보려고 했는데 접근이 막혀 있어서 이 방면의 전문가가 아니면 힘들 것 같아.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_61.english: It will take time to recover, but... we might be able to bring Aria back.
LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_61.korean: 복구까지는 시간이 걸리겠지만… 아리아를 다시 불러올 수 있을지도 몰라.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_63.english: Whoa!? Oppa? I didn't know you'd like to hug me like this...
LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_63.korean: 와앗!? 오빠?&n이렇게 껴안을 정도로 좋아할 줄은 몰랐는데…

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_64.english: What are you talking about! This isn't even enough.
LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_64.korean: 무슨 소리야! 이 정도로는 부족할 정도야.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_65.english: Hehehe… I’m happy because you’re happy, Oppa.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_66.english: Leave it to me! I'll restore it perfectly!

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_67.english: - Aria, someone might be satisfied just with clearing it.
LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_67.korean: - 아리아, 누군가는 클리어 한 것만으로도 충분히 만족할지 몰라.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_68.english: But I really liked this game.
LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_68.korean: - 하지만 나는 이 게임이 상당히 마음에 들었거든.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_69.english: So, I'm going to aim for a perfect ending where I lose nothing.
LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_69.korean: - 그러니까 그 무엇도 잃지 않는 퍼펙트 엔딩을 노릴거야.

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_8.english: The strange thing is, maybe because my brother cleared all the records, all the virtual reality data generated so far has disappeared.
LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_8.korean: 특이한 점이라면, 오빠가 모든 기록을 클리어해서인지 지금까지 생성된 가상 현실 데이터들이 전부 사라졌거든?

LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_9.english: But… only one, just one record still remains.
LastCorruptedRecord4-11ED_9.korean: 그런데… 단 하나, 한 개의 기록만은 여전히 남아 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_1.english: Staff Sergeant Inabi. I have returned from my mission.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_10.english: I am currently fighting as per Godmother's orders.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_11.english: Then what are the other reasons besides that command?
LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_11.korean: 그럼 그 명령 외 다른 이유는?

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_12.english: Are you saying there is another reason…?

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_13.english: Anything is fine. I want to hear another reason why Nabi is fighting. It doesn't have to be Jertu. Like something you want to do in the future?
LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_13.korean: 뭐든 좋아. 나비가 싸우는 다른 이유를 듣고 싶어.&n젙투가 아니어도 괜찮아.&n앞으로 하고 싶은 일이라던가?

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_14.english: Another reason for fighting… things I want to do…
LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_14.korean: 싸우는 다른 이유… 하고 싶은 것…

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_15.english: I hope you don't put my child in too much trouble. Nabi, it is okay not to go out of your way to answer questions like this.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_15.korean: 너무 우리 아이를 곤란하게 하지 않았으면 좋겠구나.&n나비야, 이런 질문은 애써 대답하지 않아도 괜찮단다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_16.english: All I need... is someone to give me orders. As long as I have orders, nothing else matters.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_16.korean: 제게... 필요한 것은 명령을 내려주실 사람뿐입니다.&n명령만 있다면 다른 건 상관없습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_17.english: However, if you order me to, I will give it some thought.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_18.english: I don't give you orders. I only guide you so that you can move forward on your own.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_18.korean: 나는 너에게 명령하지 않아.&n네가 스스로 나아갈 수 있도록 이끌 뿐이야.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_19.english: So, I hope you think about what you want for yourself.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_19.korean: 그러니까 스스로 무엇을 원하는지 생각해 봤으면 좋겠어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_2.english: You're back! This old lady was watching from a distance, too.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_21.english: Then take a short break until the next mission.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_21.korean: 그럼 다음 임무까지 잠시 쉬고 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_22.english: Um... Commander, I have a question. May I ask?
LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_22.korean: 저… 사령관님, 한 가지 질문이 있습니다.&n질문해도 괜찮겠습니까?

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_23.english: You don't need to get permission for every single thing like that. If you have any questions, just ask me right away anytime.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_23.korean: 그런 건 일일이 허가받을 필요 없어.&n궁금한 게 있으면 언제든 바로 물어봐 줘.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_24.english: I learned that getting straight to the point without first reporting is impolite to a superior.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_24.korean: 선보고 없이 본론을 말하는 것은 상관에 대한 예의가 아니라고 배웠습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_25.english: That might be true, but there are always exceptions. In my case, I actually feel like that isn't polite.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_25.korean: 그럴 수도 있겠지만, 언제나 예외는 있어.&n나 같은 경우는 오히려 그게 예의가 아니란 느낌?

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_26.english: Ah... I'm sorry. If it is an order, I will follow it.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_27.english: Weren't you scared? Please be a little kinder to my child.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_27.korean: 겁먹지 않았느냐.&n우리 아이한테 조금 더 친절하게 대해주거라.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_28.english: I didn't mean to scare you. I just wanted to get a little closer to you, Butterfly.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_28.korean: 겁줄 생각은 없었어.&n단지 나는 나비 너와 좀 더 가까워지고 싶었을 뿐이야.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_29.english: Hehe, so that is how it is. Butterfly, if you happen to be too harsh, it is okay to tell this old lady.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_29.korean: 후후, 그렇다는구나.&n나비야, 혹시라도 너무 심하게 굴면 이 할미에게 말해도 괜찮단다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_3.english: You are truly admirable. This old woman is glad to have a child like a butterfly.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_3.korean: 참으로 장하더구나.&n이 할미는 나비 같은 아이를 둬서 기쁘단다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_30.english: I am fine. It is just that my behavior was presumptuous.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_31.english: So, what are you curious about?

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_32.english: I would like to know more about the Commander.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_34.english: Yes. You are my new commander. I believe that gathering information about you will enable me to carry out my mission efficiently.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_34.korean: 네. 사령관님은 저의 새로운 명령권자이십니다.&n사령관님에 대해 정보를 수집하면, 효율적으로 임무 수행이 가능하리라 생각됩니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_35.english: So, for the sake of efficient mission execution… Alright. Fine, then I’ll be happy to let you know.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_35.korean: 효율적인 임무 수행을 위해서라… 알았어.&n좋아, 그렇다면 얼마든지 알려줄게.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_36.english: But, it wouldn't be fun if I just told you, right?

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_38.english: From now on, every time you successfully complete a mission, I will answer one question of your choice. How about it?
LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_38.korean: 앞으로 임무를 무사히 완수할 때마다, 네가 원하는 질문 한 가지 대답해 줄게. 어때?

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_4.english: You finished it off effortlessly. I can clearly see how skilled you are.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_4.korean: 여유롭게 마무리했네.&n네 실력이 어느 정도인지는 잘 알겠어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_40.english: Then I should give you the reward for today's mission first. Is there anything you want to ask?
LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_40.korean: 그럼 오늘 임무에 대한 보상부터 줘야겠지.&n물어보고 싶은 게 있어?

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_42.english: Then… what are your preferences, Commander?

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_43.english: Okay, you mean taste? My taste is… what…?

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_44.english: Did you just say you were curious about my preferences?
LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_44.korean: 지금 내 취향이 궁금하다고 말한 게 맞아?

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_45.english: Yes. We are analyzing the Commander's preferences. We would like to know what foods or activities you prefer. This is because having this information enables us to provide efficient support.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_45.korean: 네. 사령관님의 취향을 분석 중입니다.&n선호하는 음식이나 활동은 무엇인지 알고 싶습니다.&n정보가 있다면 효율적인 지원이 가능하기 때문입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_46.english: Ah… I thought it meant something else.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_46.korean: 아… 난 또 다른 의미인 줄 알았네.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_47.english: Is there another meaning? I'm curious.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_48.english: That is controversial, so let's keep it a no-comment.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_48.korean: 그건 논란의 여지가 있으니까… 노코멘트로 하자.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_49.english: However, the Commander said that he would answer anything.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_49.korean: 하지만 사령관님은 뭐든 대답해 주신다고 말씀하셨습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_5.english: Then, would you like to talk for a moment?

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_50.english: Sorry. Please bear with me this time.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_7.english: What is the butterfly fighting for?

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_8.english: … My parents were swept away by the void and disappeared. And left all alone, I met my godmother.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_8.korean: …부모가 공백에 휘말려 사라졌습니다.&n그리고 혼자가 된 저는 대모님을 만났습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_9.english: He gave me an order after I had lost everything. He gave me a way to live.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1ED_9.korean: 모든 것을 잃은 제게 명령을 내려주셨습니다.&n사는 방법을 주셨습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_10.english: Then it means you forget after death, right? That makes this old woman so sad.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_10.korean: 그렇다면 죽은 뒤엔 잊는다는 뜻이겠구나?&n그건 이 할미가 너무 슬프다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_11.english: Ah… no! I will never forget this, even after death! I deeply apologize for my thoughtless words!
LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_11.korean: 아… 아닙니다! 죽은 뒤에도 결코 잊지 않겠습니다!&n경솔한 말, 깊이 사과드립니다!

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_12.english: Haha, I'm just joking. But don't use the expression 'until I die' so carelessly.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_12.korean: 후후, 농담이란다.&n하지만 ‘죽을 때까지’라는 표현은 함부로 쓰지 말거라.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_13.english: My butterfly, you must never forget this old lady. The value of your existence is loyalty—that is, service to this old lady.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_13.korean: 우리 나비는 이 할미를 절대 잊어서는 안 돼.&n너의 존재가치는 충성, 곧 이 할미를 위한 봉사란다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_14.english: If a human loses their sense of worth, they are no different from a pig walking on two legs. Likewise, if you lose your loyalty to me, you will be reduced to a worthless doll.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_14.korean: 인간이 존재가치를 잃으면 두 발로 걷는 돼지와 다를 바 없지.&n마찬가지로 네가 나에 대한 충성을 잃는다면 가치 없는 인형으로 전락될 거란다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_15.english: Therefore, engrave that loyalty in your soul not just until death, but so that you can take it with you even to hell after death.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_15.korean: 그러니 죽을 때까지가 아니라, 죽어서도 지옥까지 가져갈 수 있도록&n그 충성심을 네 영혼에 새기거라.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_16.english: I will keep that in mind…

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_17.english: Hehe, there is no need to be too downcast. My Nabi is such a precious and kind child, so I won't get angry over a slip of the tongue like that.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_17.korean: 후후, 너무 풀이 죽을 필요는 없단다.&n우리 나비는 너무나도 소중하고 착한 아이니까, 그 정도 말실수에 화내지 않으마.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_18.english: I'm actually the one who should be sorry. As I get older, I've developed a habit of nitpicking and nagging for no reason. Don't you dislike this kind of nagging?
LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_18.korean: 오히려 미안하구나. 늙다 보니 괜히 말꼬리를 잡고 잔소리나 늘어놓는 버릇이 생겨서 말이다.&n이런 잔소리, 싫지 않으냐?

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_19.english: No! I will accept all your words as teachings!

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_2.english: You're finally awake, my Nabi. How are you feeling?
LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_2.korean: 드디어 일어났구나, 우리 나비.&n몸 상태는 어떠니?

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_20.english: That's right, that's right. This old lady really likes seeing your upright attitude.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_20.korean: 그래그래. 이 할미는 네 강직한 태도가 참 보기 좋구나.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_21.english: How long has it been since I've been out of the training camp?
LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_21.korean: 훈련소 밖으로 나와 보는 건 얼마 만이지?

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_22.english: It has been 10 years. It feels unfamiliar because it is not my room that I see every day.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_22.korean: 10년 만입니다.&n매일 보던 제 방이 아니라 낯섭니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_23.english: It will get busy once the mission starts, so you'll get used to it quickly. Is there anything you need?
LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_23.korean: 곧 임무가 시작되면 바빠질 테니, 금방 익숙해질 거란다.&n혹시 필요한 게 있느냐?

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_24.english: All I need is my Godmother to give me orders. As long as I have her, nothing else matters.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_24.korean: 제게 필요한 건 명령을 내려주실 대모님뿐입니다.&n대모님만 계신다면 다른 건 상관없습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_25.english: Still, wouldn't it be good to meet more people outside of training camp?
LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_25.korean: 그래도 훈련소 밖에서 더 많은 사람을 만나는 것도 좋지 않겠니?

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_26.english: I think personal feelings or socializing are unnecessary in battle.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_26.korean: 개인적인 감정이나 사교는 전투에 필요 없다고 생각합니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_27.english: Haha, as expected, you know me well. Fine, keep that attitude going forward.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_27.korean: 후후, 역시 잘 알고 있구나.&n그래, 앞으로도 그 태도를 지키거라.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_28.english: I will keep that in mind.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_29.english: Now, go outside. The world you had forgotten will unfold before your eyes.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_29.korean: 자, 이제 밖으로 나가 보렴.&n네가 잊었던 세상이 눈앞에 펼쳐질 것이다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_3.english: No problem. I can engage in battle right now.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_3.korean: 문제없습니다.&n지금 당장이라도 전투에 임할 수 있습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_30.english: What is the view like outside the training camp that you saw every day? Tell me your impressions.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_30.korean: 매일 보던 훈련소 바깥의 광경은 어떻니?&n감상이라도 들려주려무나.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_31.english: It doesn't seem much different from basic training.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_31.korean: 훈련소와 크게 다르지 않은 것 같습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_32.english: see. Since the whole world is already nothing but places devastated by war, it probably won't be any different from what I've seen so far.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_32.korean: 그렇겠구나.&n이미 모든 세계는 전쟁으로 피폐해진 장소뿐이니 지금까지 본 것과 다르지 않을 테지.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_33.english: You must have learned about things like the Void that suddenly appeared and led the world to destruction, or the Soul Junk that devours everything to grow in size, right?
LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_33.korean: 갑작스레 나타나 세상을 멸망으로 이끈 공백이나, 모든 것을 삼켜 크기를 불리는 괴물 소울정크 같은 것들도 모두 배우고 나왔겠지?

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_35.english: Yes, you remember well. This old lady is proud of you, Butterfly.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_35.korean: 그래, 잘 기억하고 있구나.&n이 할미는 나비가 자랑스럽단다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_36.english: Am I to move my base here and live under the orders of the Matriarch from now on?
LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_36.korean: 저는 앞으로 이곳으로 진지를 옮겨 대모님의 명령을 받으며 생활하면 되는 것입니까?

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_37.english: No, from now on, you must take orders from someone other than this old lady. That is why you came out of the training camp, isn't it?
LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_37.korean: 아니, 이제부터는 이 할미가 아닌 다른 사람의 지시를 받아야 한단다.&n그러기 위해서 훈련소에서 밖으로 나온 거잖니.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_38.english: Is the person in charge of the orders changing?

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_39.english: The person taking care of you is changing. Now, [username]. Come here.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_39.korean: 돌봐줄 사람이 바뀌는 거란다.&n자, [username]. 이리 오너라.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_4.english: Does your head hurt? It might sting a little because of the sleeping pills you took on the day of the training camp graduation ceremony.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_4.korean: 머리는 아프지 않니?&n훈련소 퇴소식 날 쓴 수면 약 때문에 머리가 좀 따끔할 수 있단다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_40.english: Hi, I've been waiting for you. So you're a 2nd generation Soulworker.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_41.english: This person is [username]. This is the commander who will lead you from now on.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_42.english: He is an arrogant man who talks back even to this old woman, but his skills are undeniable, so you can rely on him from now on.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_42.korean: 이 할미에게도 함부로 대드는 오만한 사내지만, 실력만큼은 확실하니 앞으로 의지해도 좋단다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_43.english: I am the Commander of Orca. Nice to meet you. It’s fine to call me Commander.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_43.korean: 오르카의 사령관이야. 잘 부탁해.&n편하게 사령관이라고 불러도 괜찮아.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_44.english: Commander, this child is a second-generation Soulworker who has just come out of training camp. I would appreciate it if you could help him out so he can get along well.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_44.korean: 사령관, 이 아이는 이제 막 훈련소에서 나온 2세대 소울워커란다.&n앞으로 잘 지내도록 네가 좀 도와주면 좋겠구나.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_45.english: Salute! I am Staff Sergeant Inabi. Nice to meet you!

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_46.english: Now, Nabi? This is the person who will be your direct superior from now on. Remember this well.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_46.korean: 자, 나비야?&n앞으로 네 직속 상관이 될 사람이란다. 잘 기억해 두거라.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_48.english: It's a sudden question, but can you tell me what you came here for? Tell me about yourself as you see yourself.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_48.korean: 갑작스러운 질문이지만, 넌 무엇을 위해 이곳에 왔는지 말해줄 수 있겠어?&n네가 생각하는 너 자신에 대해 알려줘.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_49.english: I have come here to pledge my loyalty to the Star Forest and humanity, and to fight the enemy until my body breaks. I am the Commander's weapon, and I am ready to move at any moment on command.
