LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_49.korean: 별숲과 인류에 충성을 바치고, 몸이 부서질 때까지 적과 싸우기 위해 이곳으로 왔습니다.&n저는 사령관님의 무기이며 명령에 따라 언제든 움직일 준비가 되어 있습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_5.english: My mind is clear, as if I have had a good rest.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_5.korean: 푹 쉬고 난 것처럼 정신이 맑습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_50.english: An order... Okay, I get it. ...As expected, you're not ordinary.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_51.english: Listen up, Nabi. I have no interest in, nor do I intend to get involved in, the kind of love you received from an old man while growing up in boot camp.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_51.korean: 잘들어, 나비.&n네가 훈련소에서 늙은이에게 어떤 사랑을 받으며 자라왔는지는 나는 관심 없고 관여할 생각도 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_52.english: Hahaha, calling me an old man? You're still such an ill-mannered man.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_54.english: My job is to guide you so that you can move forward on your own. I will spare no means or methods to draw out your strength and train you.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_54.korean: 내가 해야 할 일은 앞으로 네가 스스로 나아갈 수 있도록 이끄는 거다.&n네 힘을 끌어내고 단련하기 위해서라면 어떤 수단과 방법도 가리지 않겠어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_55.english: Yes! I will keep that in mind.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_56.english: Okay. Then I’ll assign you your first mission right away.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_56.korean: 좋아. 그럼 곧바로 네게 첫 임무를 맡길게.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_57.english: As you know, we have established a military perimeter to block the influx of Soul Junk from the outside and are working hard to maintain it.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_57.korean: 알다시피 우리는 외부에서 밀려드는 소울정크를 막기 위해 군사 경계선을 구축하고 그 유지에 힘쓰고 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_58.english: If that boundary collapses, this place will be taken over by Soul Junk in an instant.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_58.korean: 만약 그 경계선이 무너진다면 이곳은 순식간에 소울정크에 잠식당할 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_59.english: Sergeant Inabi. Go to that boundary line now and show them your skills in person.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_59.korean: 이나비 하사.&n지금부터 그 경계선에 가서 직접 네 실력을 보여줘.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_6.english: Then think carefully about who this old woman is and tell me.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_6.korean: 그렇다면 이 할미가 누군지 잘 생각해서 말해 보려무나.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_61.english: No. If you just let me know the coordinates, I will head there immediately.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_62.english: Hehe, it's good to see you so spirited. Keep up the good work.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_63.english: Yes, Godmother. I will do my best.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_7.english: The person leading the Star Forest League. She is Godmother Jang Yeseop, who took me in when I had nowhere to go and guided me while educating me at the training camp.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_7.korean: 별숲리그를 이끄시는 분.&n갈 곳 없는 저를 거두어 주시고, 훈련소에서 교육하며 이끌어주신 장예섭 대모님이십니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_8.english: Hehe, you remember well. You're amazing, my baby.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_8.korean: 후후, 잘 기억하고 있구나.&n장하구나, 우리 아가.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1OP_9.english: Yes, I will never forget it until the moment I die.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_10.english: To think they can wear such a daring outfit so casually... aren't they ashamed?
LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_10.korean: 저런 대담한 복장을 아무렇지도 않게 입을 수 있다니...&n부끄럽지 않은 걸까요?

LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_11.english: If I think about wearing an outfit like that... Ugh... It's impossible...
LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_11.korean: 제가 저런 복장을 입는다고 생각하면... 으... 무리에요…

LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_12.english: Still, it's a relief that Mr. Varg is wearing normal clothes.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_12.korean: 그래도 바르그 씨는 정상적인 복장이라 다행이에요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_13.english: If even Mr. Varg had been dressed like that, I think it would have been difficult to strike up a conversation.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_13.korean: 뭔가 바르그 씨까지 저런 복장이었다면 말을 걸기 어려웠을 것 같아요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_16.english: It's nothing. More importantly, is there anything else you'd like to order?
LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_16.korean: 아무것도 아니다.&n그보다 뭐 추가로 주문할 건 없나?

LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_17.english: Since it's your first time here today, I'll pay for you...
LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_17.korean: 오늘은 처음 왔으니 내가 대신 내주...

LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_18.english: Why are you avoiding answering so casually?
LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_18.korean: 뭘 아무렇지도 않게 대답 회피하는 건데?

LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_19.english: Are you seriously planning to make us out to be the only exhibitionists? Why don't you show me too?
LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_19.korean: 설마 우리만 노출증 환자로 만들 셈이야?&n너도 어서 보여주지 그래?

LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_2.english: I will guide you to an empty seat! I will seat the two guests.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_2.korean: 빈자리로 안내해 드릴게요!&n손님 두 분 자리로 모시겠습니다~

LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_20.english: What? You mean, show me... what?

LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_21.english: Heh, you guys... you're nothing. Don't worry about it.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_21.korean: 큭, 너희들…&n아무것도 아니다. 신경 쓰지 마라.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_22.english: So that's how you're going to play it? Hey, hold on tight.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_23.english: There shouldn't be any discrimination among the same cafe staff, right?
LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_23.korean: 같은 카페 직원끼리 차별이 있으면 안 되겠지?

LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_26.english: Hmph, I won't be taken advantage of as easily as last time.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_26.korean: 흥, 지난번처럼 쉽게 당하진 않을 거다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_27.english: You quick-witted little brat... If you don't want to take it off, well, I guess it can't be helped... Ah, the new guest... Huh? A hot pack?
LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_27.korean: 눈치 빠른 똥깡아지 같으니라고... 벗기 싫다면 어쩔 수 없지…&n아, 새로 오신 손님이… 어? 핫팩?

LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_31.english: Wow wow wow... Mr. Varg's outfit...

LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_34.english: No. You have to work like that today.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_34.korean: 안 돼. 오늘은 그 상태로 업무 보는 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_35.english: So what? It’s not like it’ll wear out just because you show it to others, right? You said it’s nothing to be ashamed of anyway.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_35.korean: 뭐, 어때? 남들에게 보여준다고 해서 닳는 것도 아니잖아?&n별로 부끄러운 일도 아니라면서.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_36.english: Even so, I have no intention of showing my bare skin to anyone other than my master!
LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_36.korean: 아무리 그래도 주인님 외에는 맨살을 보여줄 생각 없다!

LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_38.english: Do you think I'll be fooled twice?

LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_39.english: I stopped by briefly while passing through, and it's kind of noisy.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_4.english: One Special Jumbo Hotcake, one Mixed Berry Cheesecake, and one Caffè Latte and one Milkshake, right?
LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_4.korean: 스페셜 점보 핫케이크 하나, 믹스 베리 치즈 케이크 하나,&n그리고 카페라테 한 잔, 밀크셰이크 한 잔 맞지?

LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_41.english: Barg? What brings you here? Are you working dressed like that today?
LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_41.korean: 바르그? 웬일이야?&n오늘은 그 차림으로 일하는 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_43.english: It looks like they took it off in advance and were waiting, thinking the hot pack was coming.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_43.korean: 핫팩 오는 줄 알고 미리 벗고 기다리고 있었나 봐~

LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_47.english: I don't need to force myself to understand it, right?

LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_48.english: Ah, I'll place an additional order here!

LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_5.english: I'll bring it right away, so wait.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_7.english: What have you been looking around for since earlier?

LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_8.english: Ah, Mr. Varg... well... I have gotten somewhat used to it since coming to Orca, but...
LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_8.korean: 아, 바르그 씨...&n그게... 오르카에 와서 이제 어느 정도 익숙해지긴 했는데…

LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_9.english: I feel this every time, but I think everyone's outfits are amazing.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_9.korean: 매번 느끼는 거지만 다들 복장이 대단하다고 생각돼서요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_1.english: Victory! Staff Sergeant Inabi has completed her mission and returned.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_10.english: Good job, Nabi. How was your first mission with the Steel Line unit?
LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_10.korean: 수고했어, 나비.&n스틸 라인 부대에서의 첫 임무는 어땠어?

LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_11.english: Personally, I rate it as excellent.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_12.english: I agree. He had good combat sense, and his teamwork with the other members wasn't bad either. He was absolutely outstanding.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_12.korean: 나도 동의해.&n전투 센스도 좋았고, 다른 대원들과의 호흡도 나쁘지 않았어. 더할 나위 없이 우수했지.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_13.english: It is an honor to be able to live up to expectations.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_14.english: Is that response for the sake of the order, after all?

LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_15.english: … That is a difficult question to understand. I apologize, but could you please be a little more specific?
LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_15.korean: …이해하기 어려운 질문입니다.&n죄송하지만, 조금 더 구체적으로 말씀해 주시길 부탁드립니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_16.english: I'm asking if you can draw out your power only to carry out an order.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_16.korean: 명령을 수행하기 위해서만, 네 힘을 끌어낼 수 있는 건지 묻는 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_17.english: That… I’m not really sure. All I know is to be loyal to the Star Forest and humanity, and to risk my life for orders.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_17.korean: 그건… 잘 모르겠습니다.&n제가 아는 건 그저 별숲과 인류에 충성하는 것, 그리고 명령에 목숨을 거는 것뿐입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_18.english: I haven't thought beyond that. I'm sorry.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_18.korean: 그 이상은 생각해 본 적이 없습니다. 죄송합니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_19.english: Certainly, it might be more comfortable to just follow orders without hesitation.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_19.korean: 확실히, 고민 없이 명령대로만 사는 게 마음 편할 수도 있지.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_2.english: You're so amazing, my baby. Are you hurt anywhere?

LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_20.english: Moving when ordered, and standing still when not ordered. Like a clockwork doll that might start moving again at any moment.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_20.korean: 명령이 내려오면 움직이고, 명령이 없으면 멈춰 서 있는 것.&n언제 다시 움직일지 모르는 시계태엽 인형처럼 말이야.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_21.english: Thank you for the advice. I will keep it in mind.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_22.english: However, that cannot be called a life lived like a human being.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_22.korean: 하지만, 그건 사람답게 사는 삶이라고는 할 수 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_23.english: It's just a puppet with no will and unable to move on its own.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_23.korean: 의지도 없고 스스로 움직일 수도 없는 꼭두각시일 뿐이지.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_24.english: Nabi, do you really want that kind of life?
LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_24.korean: 나비, 넌 정말로 그런 삶을 원하는 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_25.english: I… what I have to follow is…

LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_26.english: Would it be okay if I thought about it?

LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_27.english: Of course. It’s okay if you take your time, but I hope you’ll let me know your answer someday.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_27.korean: 물론이지.&n천천히라도 괜찮으니, 언젠가 네 답을 들려줬으면 해.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_28.english: Oh, right, I should give the reward for this mission too.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_3.english: No, there were no problems. However, Godmother, there is one thing I am curious about. May I ask?
LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_3.korean: 없습니다. 아무 문제 없었습니다.&n다만 대모님, 궁금한 것이 하나 있습니다.&n질문해도 괜찮겠습니까?

LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_30.english: Did you forget already? I promised to answer one of your questions every time you successfully completed a mission.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_30.korean: 벌써 잊었어?&n임무를 무사히 완수할 때마다 내가 네 질문 하나에 대답해 주기로 했잖아.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_31.english: However, you brushed off the last question with an ambiguous answer…
LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_31.korean: 그렇지만 지난번 질문은 애매한 대답으로 넘어가셨습니다…

LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_32.english: Sorry, but it's perfectly fine if you have any other questions.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_32.korean: 미안, 그래도 다른 질문이라면 얼마든지 괜찮아.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_33.english: will think about that question as well... together.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_5.english: When I rescued soldiers who were isolated on the battlefield, they thanked me. It felt strange to receive thanks, as I had merely fought on orders.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_5.korean: 현장에서 고립된 병사들을 구출했을 때, 병사들이 저에게 감사 인사를 했습니다.&n저는 그저 명령을 받아 싸웠을 뿐인데, 감사 인사를 받는 것이 이상했습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_6.english: Am I... okay with receiving such gratitude?
LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_6.korean: 저는… 그런 감사를 받아도 괜찮은 겁니까?

LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_7.english: Do not think too deeply. Weak humans always merely cry out uglyly to be spared.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_7.korean: 깊게 생각하지 말거라.&n나약한 인간은 언제나 추하게 살려달라 외칠 뿐이다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_8.english: What our butterfly must listen to is this old lady's words, and what our butterfly must follow is this old lady's instructions. Do you understand?
LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_8.korean: 우리 나비가 들어야 할 것은 이 할미의 말,&n우리 나비가 따라야 할 것은 이 할미의 지시. 알겠니?

LastCorruptedRecord4-2ED_9.english: Yes, I will keep that in mind.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_1.english: I have a new mission today.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_10.english: Excuse me. I have come to pay my respects on the Commander's orders.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_11.english: Oh, I'm finally here! Hello! I'm Brownie from the Steel Line unit!
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_11.korean: 오옷, 드디어 왔슴다!&n안녕하심까! 저는 스틸 라인 부대의 브라우니라고 함다!

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_12.english: I am a Leprechaun from the same Steel Line unit. Nice to meet you. I have already heard about you from the Commander.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_12.korean: 같은 스틸 라인 부대 소속의 레프리콘입니다. 잘 부탁드립니다.&n사령관 각하께 이야기는 이미 들었습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_13.english: I am Staff Sergeant Inabi. I look forward to working with you. That is all.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_14.english: Uh, wait a minute! Staff Sergeant Inabi!

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_15.english: Why are you acting like this?

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_16.english: Are you really just going to say hello and leave?

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_17.english: Yes. I was instructed to pay my respects to the Commander, and since I have completed my mission, there is no reason to stay any longer.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_17.korean: 네. 사령관님께 인사를 하고 오도록 지시받았고, 임무를 완료했으니 더 이상 머무를 이유가 없습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_18.english: Even so, it puts us in a difficult position if you just say hello and leave like that.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_18.korean: 아무리 그래도, 이렇게 인사만 하고 휙 가버리시면 저희가 곤란합니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_19.english: Did the Commander say anything more than just a greeting? Like, try to get close to me, or have a chat!
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_19.korean: 사령관님께서 인사말고 다른 말을 더 하시진 않았슴까?&n친해져 보라던가, 얘기 좀 해보라던 가 말임다!

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_20.english: … He said that getting close would be good for future missions.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_21.english: So, doesn't that mean we should talk enough to become close?
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_21.korean: 그럼 친해질 정도로 많이 얘기를 나누라는 거 아님까!

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_22.english: … However, this is merely a recommendation. The only instruction was regarding personnel matters.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_23.english: Isn't a recommendation supposed to be something that should be followed as much as possible...?
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_23.korean: 권장은 가급적 행동해야 하는 부분이 아님까…?

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_24.english: I will consider it if I get time off from combat in the future. For now, following orders is the priority.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_24.korean: 향후 전투휴무의 시간을 갖게 된다면 고려하겠습니다.&n지금은 지시대로 움직이는 것이 우선입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_25.english: Leprechaun Squad Leader... You're the first person I've met who's this frustrating.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_25.korean: 레프리콘 분대장님… 이런 식으로 답답한 사람은 처음임다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_26.english: In that case, let me at least explain our role. That would be helpful for your mission, wouldn't it?
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_26.korean: 그렇다면 저희 역할이라도 설명해 드릴게요.&n그 편이 임무에 도움이 되시겠죠?

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_27.english: Brownie and I are infantry, responsible for close-range fire support and establishing the front line.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_27.korean: 저와 브라우니는 보병으로 근거리 화력 지원과 전선 구축을 맡고 있어요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_28.english: Since Staff Sergeant Inabi is a sniper, please leave the task of securing visibility and blocking enemy approaches to us.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_28.korean: 이나비 하사님은 저격수니까, 시야 확보와 적의 접근 차단은 저희에게 맡겨주세요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_3.english: But before that, there are colleagues I need to introduce first.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_3.korean: 하지만 그전에 먼저 소개해야 할 동료들이 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_30.english: I understand. I look forward to working with you in the future.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_31.english: Ugh, he's a really stiff person...

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_32.english: Being quiet and efficient is an advantage, but if you are this rigid, it could be a problem.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_32.korean: 조용하고 효율적인 건 장점이지만, 이렇게까지 딱딱하신 거라면 문제일 수 있겠네요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_33.english: Anyway, I look forward to working with you!

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_34.english: Oh, welcome! I've been waiting for you!

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_35.english: Please take this first. It's supplies. Since you are a sniper, Staff Sergeant Inabi, you will likely need additional camouflage equipment as well.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_35.korean: 일단 이것부터 받아 가세요.&n보급품이에요. 이나비 하사님은 저격병이시니까 추가로 위장 장비도 필요하실 테고요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_36.english: Huh? Oh, I was just planning to say hello and leave…
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_36.korean: 네? 아, 저는 인사만 하고 가려고…

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_37.english: I see, that's an introduction! My name is PX Silky. I belong to the Steel Line Support Unit and am in charge of supplying the squad.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_37.korean: 인사 말씀이시군요! 저는 PX 실키라고 합니다.&n스틸 라인 지원부대 소속으로, 분대의 보급을 담당하고 있어요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_38.english: From standard ammunition to bedding, snacks, and even a doll commemorating Staff Sergeant Ifrit's commissioning, please let me know if there is anything you need.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_38.korean: 일반 탄약부터 침구류, 간식, 그리고 이프리트 하사님의 임관 기념 인형까지, 필요한 게 있다면 뭐든 말씀해 주세요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_39.english: Speaking of supplies… can I receive food as well?

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_4.english: You may have already crossed paths a few times while looking around; these are the Orca members who will be joining you on your mission from now on.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_4.korean: 이미 주변을 둘러보면서 몇 번 마주쳤을 수도 있겠네, 지금부터 너와 임무를 함께할 오르카의 대원들이야.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_40.english: You mean combat rations, right? Of course! We have the latest Type 1, Type 2, and Type 3 combat rations here. Which one do you prefer?
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_40.korean: 전투 식량 말씀이시죠? 물론이에요!&n여기 최신 전투 식량 1형, 2형, 3형이 있는데 어떤 게 좋으세요?

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_41.english: What are the differences between them?

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_42.english: The only difference is the diet. Each member has different preferences.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_42.korean: 식단만 좀 다를 뿐이에요.&n대원들마다 선호하는 게 다르거든요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_43.english: I recommend Type 3. It includes cake, so you can enjoy dessert as well! If you want to eat a lot, Type 2 is also good. The ham fried rice is very hearty and delicious!
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_43.korean: 제 추천은 3형이에요. 케이크가 들어 있어서 디저트까지 즐길 수 있어요!&n많이 드시고 싶으시다면 2형도 괜찮아요. 햄 볶음밥이 아주 푸짐하고 맛있어요!

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_45.english: I was only instructed to go say hello, so I will be leaving now.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_45.korean: 저는 인사를 나누고 오라는 지시만 받았으니, 이만 돌아가겠습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_46.english: I will come to pick up the supplies when a new mission is assigned.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_46.korean: 보급품은 새로운 임무가 주어졌을 때 받으러 오겠습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_47.english: Yes, I understand. Please feel free to come see me anytime if you need anything.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_47.korean: 네, 알겠어요.&n필요한 게 생기시면 언제든지 절 찾아와 주세요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_49.english: The last person I have to meet is… of the Steel Line unit…
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_49.korean: 마지막으로 만나야 하는 사람은… 스틸 라인 부대의…

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_5.english: We'll be helping each other a lot in the future, so why don't you go say hello to everyone?
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_5.korean: 앞으로 많은 도움을 주고받을 테니 모두에게 인사를 하고 오는 게 어때?

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_50.english: Are you a new soldier joining our Steel Line unit?
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_50.korean: 네가 우리 스틸 라인 부대에 새로 편입되는 병사인가?

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_51.english: Ah... Salute, I am Staff Sergeant Inabi. Nice to meet you.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_51.korean: 앗… 충성, 이나비 하사입니다. 잘 부탁드립니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_54.english: Is that all the voice you can come out of! Is that how you learned in boot camp!
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_54.korean: 목소리가 그것밖에 안 나오나! 훈련소에서 그렇게 배웠나!

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_55.english: The loudness of your voice is the loudness of your confidence! Our unit doesn't need soldiers without confidence!
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_55.korean: 목소리의 크기는 곧 자신감의 크기다!&n우리 부대엔 자신감 없는 병사는 필요 없다!

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_56.english: And the Orca salute is not loyalty, but victory! If you have come to Orca, learn the Orca rules first!
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_56.korean: 그리고 오르카의 경례는 충성이 아니라 승리다!&n오르카에 왔다면 오르카의 규칙부터 배워라!

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_57.english: Victory! Excuse me! I am Staff Sergeant Inabi! Nice to meet you!

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_58.english: Good! That voice is enough! I am Marida, the captain of the Steel Line!
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_58.korean: 좋다! 그 목소리라면 충분하다!&n나는 스틸 라인 부대의 대장, 마리다!

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_59.english: By order of the Commander, you are temporarily incorporated into our Steel Line unit.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_59.korean: 사령관 각하의 지시에 따라 너를 우리 스틸 라인 부대에 임시 편입시킨다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_6.english: And I am also thinking of incorporating you into that unit for the time being, albeit temporarily. Once you get close to them, you will definitely be of help during missions.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_6.korean: 그리고 임시지만 당분간 너를 그 부대에 편입시킬 생각이기도 해.&n친해지면 임무 중에 확실히 도움이 될 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_60.english: Even if it is temporary, you are currently a soldier of the Steel Line. Keep this in mind, because if we determine that you do not fit in with our unit, we will send you out immediately!
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_60.korean: 임시라 해도 지금의 넌 스틸 라인의 병사다.&n우리 부대에 어울리지 않는다고 판단되면 곧바로 내보낼 테니 명심해라!

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_61.english: Yes! I will keep that in mind, Captain!

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_62.english: Looks like you finished saying hello.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_63.english: Yes! I just quickly said hello and came back!!

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_64.english: Uh... for some reason, you seem much more disciplined than when you first stepped forward. Did something happen?
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_64.korean: 어… 왠지 나설 때보다 훨씬 군기가 오른 것 같은데?&n무슨 일 있었어?

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_65.english: No! I just realized that I had become complacent!

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_66.english: From now on, following the Commander's orders, I will carry out my missions with all my heart alongside Captain Marie in the Steel Line Unit!
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_66.korean: 앞으로는 사령관님의 명령에 따라 스틸 라인 부대에서 마리 대장님과 함께 전심전력으로 임무에 임하겠습니다!

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_67.english: Oh… yeah, it’s nice to see you full of confidence.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_67.korean: 오… 그래, 자신감이 넘쳐서 보기 좋네.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_68.english: But did you really just say hello and come back?
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_68.korean: 그런데 정말로 인사만 하고 온 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_69.english: Yes! I did not take any actions other than the Commander's orders!
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_69.korean: 네! 사령관님의 지시 이외의 행동은 하지 않았습니다!

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_70.english: I didn't think it would actually happen that I just went to say hello... That's surprising...
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_70.korean: 설마했는데 정말로 인사만 하고 올 줄이야… 놀랍네…

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_72.english: I'm sorry, but that's not a compliment. Next time, make sure to talk to me properly.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_72.korean: 미안하지만, 칭찬이 아니야.&n다음에는 반드시 제대로 이야기를 나눠줘.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_73.english: Now, I will give you the next mission. This mission isn't just about fighting Soul Junk. It also includes rescuing people.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_73.korean: 이제 다음 임무를 전달할게.&n이번 임무는 단순히 소울정크와 싸우는 것만이 아니야. 사람을 구하는 임무도 포함되어 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_74.english: There are soldiers isolated in the underground passage of the border we visited earlier. The goal of this operation is to eliminate Soul Junk and rescue the isolated soldiers together with the Steel Line members.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_74.korean: 이전에 다녀온 경계선 지하로에 고립된 병사들이 있어.&n이번 작전은 스틸 라인 대원들과 함께 소울정크를 섬멸하고, 고립된 병사들을 구출하는 것이 목표야.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_75.english: Understood! I will head to the scene right now!

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_76.english: Leprechaun Squad Leader, it's darker here than I thought, so the atmosphere is a bit spooky.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_76.korean: 레프리콘 분대장님, 여긴 생각보다 어두워서 분위기가 으스스하지 말임다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_77.english: You wouldn't know when or where an enemy might pop out, so it would be best to move cautiously.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_77.korean: 언제 어디서 적이 튀어나올지 모르니 신중히 움직이는 게 좋겠어요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_78.english: Here are the flares and flashlights. Sergeant Inabi, you don't have night vision goggles, do you? Keep them here.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_78.korean: 자, 여기 조명탄과 손전등이에요.&n이나비 하사님, 야간 투시경은 없으시죠? 여기 챙겨두세요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_8.english: Leprechaun Squad Leader… how long do we have to wait here?
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_8.korean: 레프리콘 분대장님… 저희 언제까지 여기서 대기해야 함까?

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_80.english: Staff Sergeant Inabi. This is your first mission with our Steel Line unit. Aren't you nervous?
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_80.korean: 이나비 하사.&n우리 스틸 라인 부대에서의 첫 임무다. 긴장되진 않나?

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_81.english: No! On the contrary, I consider it an honor to be able to fight alongside everyone!
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_81.korean: 아닙니다! 모두와 함께 싸울 수 있어 오히려 영광이라고 생각합니다!

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_83.english: Steel Line Unit, enter battle now to rescue the isolated soldiers!
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_83.korean: 스틸 라인 부대, 지금부터 전투에 돌입하여 고립된 병사들을 구출한다!

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_84.english: Make sure to show those bastards, and the new recruit, your true power!
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_84.korean: 제군의 저력을 놈들에게, 그리고 새로 합류한 대원에게 확실히 보여주도록!

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_9.english: It is something His Excellency the Commander personally requested, isn't it? Just wait a little longer.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_9.korean: 사령관 각하께서 직접 부탁하신 일이잖아요? 조금만 더 기다려봐요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2SUBED_1.english: That's quite impressive, challenger. Honestly, I didn't think you would make it this far.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2SUBED_1.korean: 제법이구나 도전자여.&n솔직히 여기까지 도달할 거라고는 생각하지 않았다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2SUBED_10.english: - Hella and Ireina have already played all their cards and are finished, so only Stella and I are left. I have 2 cards left, Stella has 1…
LastCorruptedRecord4-2SUBED_10.korean: - 헬라와 이레이나는 이미 모든 카드를 내서 끝났고, 남은 건 나와 스텔라 뿐.&n남은 카드는 내가 2장 스텔라가 1장…

LastCorruptedRecord4-2SUBED_11.english: This can be said to be the moment when the tension reaches its peak in the game of Catch the Thief.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2SUBED_11.korean: - 도둑잡기 게임에서 제일 긴장감이 고조되는 순간이라 할 수 있다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2SUBED_13.english: Stella slowly reached out and took one of the cards I had.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2SUBED_13.korean: - 스텔라는 천천히 손을 내밀어 내가 가진 카드 중 1장을 가져갔다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2SUBED_14.english: - If it were a normal card, the match would be over with this, but...

LastCorruptedRecord4-2SUBED_16.english: Hehe, then it's my turn this time.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2SUBED_18.english: - Well, what should I do... At this point, the outcome depends entirely on luck... right...?
LastCorruptedRecord4-2SUBED_18.korean: - 자, 어떡한다… 여기까지 오면 결국 승부는 전적으로 운에 달린 거잖아… 응…?

LastCorruptedRecord4-2SUBED_19.english: I reached for the card on the left among the cards Stella held out.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2SUBED_19.korean: - 나는 스텔라가 내민 카드 중 왼쪽에 있는 카드에 손을 가져갔다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2SUBED_2.english: But it looks like the luck that has guided you has run its course!
LastCorruptedRecord4-2SUBED_2.korean: 하지만 너를 이끌어준 운도 여기까지인 모양이군!

LastCorruptedRecord4-2SUBED_21.english: This time, I reached for the card on the right.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2SUBED_21.korean: - 이번에는 오른쪽에 있는 카드에 손을 가져갔다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2SUBED_27.english: That's easy to understand... I'm sorry to Stella, but competition is ruthless. With the left card like this...
LastCorruptedRecord4-2SUBED_27.korean: - 알기 쉽네… 스텔라에게는 미안하지만, 승부는 냉정한 법 이대로 왼쪽 카드를…

LastCorruptedRecord4-2SUBED_3.english: Now, come on! I, Ireina, will defeat you right here!
LastCorruptedRecord4-2SUBED_3.korean: 자, 와라! 나 이레이나가 널 여기서 꺾어주마!

LastCorruptedRecord4-2SUBED_31.english: - No, I have to draw the left card…

LastCorruptedRecord4-2SUBED_36.english: - Right, it's not over yet. The Joker has simply returned to my hands; if Stella draws the Joker again, the match will not end.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2SUBED_36.korean: - 그래, 아직 끝나지 않았어.&n조커가 다시 내 손으로 돌아왔을 뿐, 스텔라가 조커를 다시 뽑을 경우 승부는 나지 않는다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2SUBED_38.english: Yeah! Hella is cheering for me! I'm definitely going to win!
LastCorruptedRecord4-2SUBED_38.korean: 응! 헬라 언니가 응원해 주고 있어!&n반드시 이길 거야!

LastCorruptedRecord4-2SUBED_39.english: Stella slowly reached out her hand toward the cards and drew another one.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2SUBED_39.korean: - 스텔라는 천천히 카드를 향해 손을 내밀어 다시 한 장을 뽑았다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2SUBED_41.english: I'm glad if you enjoyed it.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2SUBED_42.english: Yeah! I want to play together again next time!
LastCorruptedRecord4-2SUBED_42.korean: 응! 다음에 또 같이 놀고 싶어!

LastCorruptedRecord4-2SUBED_43.english: Yes! Let's play together again next time!

LastCorruptedRecord4-2SUBED_44.english: Commander, you too! Let's play together again!

LastCorruptedRecord4-2SUBED_45.english: In the end, he abandoned me... but oh well, whatever.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2SUBED_46.english: Because I could see Stella looking so happy.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2SUBED_46.korean: - 스텔라가 저렇게 즐거워하는 표정을 볼 수 있었으니까.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2SUBED_5.english: … Ireina, it's Stella's turn now. Besides, you're already finished.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2SUBED_5.korean: …이레이나, 지금은 스텔라 차례잖아.&n게다가 넌 이미 끝났고.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2SUBED_6.english: Yeah, so hang in there, Demon King! You can't lose!
LastCorruptedRecord4-2SUBED_6.korean: 응, 그러니까 힘내 마왕 오빠!&n지면 안 돼!

LastCorruptedRecord4-2SUBED_7.english: Cheer up, Stella! You can do it!

LastCorruptedRecord4-2SUBED_9.english: The game of catching the thief started again by chance.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_101.english: We have safely finished our combat meal. I will return to the Commander as is to report…
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_101.korean: 무사히 전투 취식을 마쳤습니다.&n이대로 사령관님에게 돌아가 보고를…

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_102.english: Sergeant Inabi, are you alright for a moment?

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_103.english: Captain Mari…!? V-Victory!! Yes, I’m fine!

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_104.english: Victory. You don't need to be so nervous. Last time, I just wanted to show what kind of unit Steel Line is.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_104.korean: 승리. 그렇게 긴장하지 않아도 된다.&n저번에는 스틸 라인이 어떤 부대인지 보여주고 싶었을 뿐이다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_105.english: Come to think of it, I might have been a bit stiff.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_105.korean: 생각해 보니 내가 조금 딱딱했을지도 모르겠군.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_108.english: The reason I stopped you is because I heard that our team members owe you a debt. I want to express my gratitude.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_108.korean: 널 불러 세운 건 우리 대원들이 네게 신세를 졌다고 들었기 때문이다.&n고맙다는 말을 전하고 싶다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_109.english: I just did what was natural as a fellow Steel Line unit member.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_109.korean: 같은 스틸 라인 부대원으로서 당연한 일을 했을 뿐입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_11.english: I will receive combat rations from Silky, who is in charge of supplies, and proceed with combat eating.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_11.korean: 보급을 담당하는 실키에게 전투 식량을 배급받아 전투 취식에 임하겠습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_110.english: Are they fellow Steel Line unit members…

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_111.english: Haha, you're right. It's so obvious that I actually forgot.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_111.korean: 하하, 맞는 말이다. 너무 당연해서 내가 잊고 있었군.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_112.english: Actually, when I heard about you from His Excellency, I was a little worried about whether you would get along well with the other members.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_112.korean: 사실 각하께 네 이야기를 들었을 때는,&n다른 대원들과 잘 지낼지 조금 걱정을 했었다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_113.english: But I guess it was unnecessary worry. I apologize.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_113.korean: 하지만 아무래도 쓸데없는 걱정이었나 보군.&n내 사과하지.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_115.english: I couldn't get along well with my fellow trainees even during my training camp days.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_115.korean: 훈련소 시절에도 동기들과 잘 지내지 못했습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_116.english: The instructors also used to point out my relationships with my peers, so there must have been some shortcomings on my part.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_116.korean: 교관들 역시 동기들과의 관계를 지적하곤 했으니, 분명 제게 부족한 점이 있었을 겁니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_118.english: The way I see it, the Staff Sergeant doesn't seem to lack anything.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_118.korean: 내가 보기에 하사에게는 부족한 점이 없어 보인다만?

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_12.english: Okay. Go have a delicious meal.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_120.english: Sergeant, it is not that you are lacking; you are simply different from others. And just because you are different from others does not make you wrong.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_120.korean: 하사, 그대가 부족한 게 아니라 다른 이들과 다를 뿐이다.&n그리고 다른 이들과 다르다고 해서 그게 잘못인 건 아니지.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_121.english: I believe that precisely because I am different, I can say and do things that others cannot.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_121.korean: 오히려 다르기에 남들이 하지 못할 말과 행동을 할 수 있다고 나는 생각한다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_122.english: It is enough to simply understand your comrades and have the will to act for their sake. That is true camaraderie.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_122.korean: 동료들을 이해하고 동료를 위해 행동하겠다는 마음만 있으면 충분하다.&n그것이 진짜 전우애다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_123.english: So don't blame yourself. I believe you are doing a great job as a member of Steel Line.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_123.korean: 그러니 자신을 탓하지 말아라.&n나는 그대가 스틸 라인의 일원으로 충분히 잘하고 있다고 믿는다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_124.english: I will take that to heart. Thank you, Captain.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_125.english: If you ever have any difficulties or questions, please come to me; I will be there to support you.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_125.korean: 언제든 곤란한 일이나 궁금한 게 생긴다면 나에게 찾아오도록 힘이 되어 주겠다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_126.english: In that case, let me ask you one thing.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_127.english: Is that a question right away? Right, what are you curious about?

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_128.english: I am curious about the Commander's preferences.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_131.english: I'm, I'm fine. I was just a little surprised.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_132.english: So, you're saying you're curious about His Excellency's tastes?

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_133.english: Yes. I would like to know more about the Commander.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_133.korean: 네. 사령관님을 더 자세히 알고 싶습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_134.english: Hmm, good! If that's the case, I'll tell you anything!

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_137.english: Commander, I have returned after finishing my combat meal.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_138.english: Welcome back. It seems like it took a while. What happened?
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_138.korean: 어서 와. 시간이 좀 걸린 것 같은데, 무슨 일 있었어?

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_139.english: I was late because I was talking with the Steel Line members. I apologize.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_139.korean: 스틸 라인 대원들과 이야기를 나누느라 늦었습니다. 죄송합니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_140.english: It's okay. In fact, it's good to get close to the other members. It's fine to talk to the members often in the future.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_140.korean: 괜찮아. 오히려 다른 대원들과 친해지면 좋지.&n앞으로도 대원들과 자주 얘기해도 괜찮아.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_144.english: Commander, may I receive the reward for the last mission now?
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_144.korean: 사령관님, 지난 임무의 보상을 지금 받아도 되겠습니까?

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_145.english: You mean the question? Fine, I'll give you a proper answer this time.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_145.korean: 질문 말이지?&n좋아, 이번에는 제대로 대답해 줄게.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_146.english: Commander, do you perhaps… like to be spoiled?
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_146.korean: 사령관님은 혹시… 응석을 부리는 걸 좋아하십니까?

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_150.english: In that case, do you want to… act spoiled toward me too?

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_154.english: As expected, it is nothing. It was a slip of the tongue. I would appreciate it if you would forget what I just said.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_154.korean: 역시 아무 것도 아닙니다. 실언이었습니다.&n방금 발언은 잊어주셨으면 합니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_155.english: Well then, I will prepare for the next mission. Excuse me!

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_156.english: … Haha, I'm glad I think I've become really close with the Steel Line guys.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_156.korean: …하하, 스틸 라인 애들하고 많이 친해진 거 같아 다행이야.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_157.english: It seems like there were a few unexpected things, though.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_157.korean: 조금, 예상 밖에 일도 있었던 거 같지만.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_17.english: Huh? Staff Sergeant Inabi! What brings you here?
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_17.korean: 어? 이나비 하사님! 무슨 일로 오셨어요?

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_19.english: What? A promise? Did we make some kind of promise?
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_19.korean: 네? 약속?&n저희 뭔가 약속 같은 걸 했었나요?

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_2.english: What's wrong? You're sighing for the first time in a while. You look exhausted. Are you feeling unwell?
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_2.korean: 무슨 일이야? 안 쉬던 한숨을 쉬고.&n지쳐 보이는데, 어디 아픈 데라도 있어?

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_20.english: I would like to receive combat rations.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_21.english: Ah, yes, we did talk about that.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_22.english: Yes, understood! Which one would you like: Type 1, Type 2, or Type 3?
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_22.korean: 네, 알겠습니다!&n1형, 2형, 3형 중에 어느 걸로 드릴까요?

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_23.english: The Type 3 I recommended? Or would you like the Type 2 with the larger quantity? Oh, by the way, Type 1 is…
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_23.korean: 제가 추천한 3형? 아니면 양이 많은 2형으로 드릴까요?&n아, 참고로 1형은…

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_26.english: I would like to receive all three.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_27.english: Um... do you mean all three? Ah! So you want to receive them in advance!
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_27.korean: 어… 세 개 전부 말씀이신가요?&n아! 미리 받고 싶으시다는 거군요!

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_28.english: Come to think of it, you never know when something might happen, so it's probably best to get supplies while you can!
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_28.korean: 하긴, 언제 무슨 일이 생길지 모르니&n보급을 받을 수 있을 때 받아 두는 게 아무래도 좋겠죠!

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_32.english: Are you perhaps planning to eat it all at once...?
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_32.korean: 혹시, 한 번에 다 드실 생각이신 건…?

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_34.english: Yeah... well... it should be fine... since it's your first time... just try a little bit of everything...
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_34.korean: 네… 뭐… 괜찮겠죠… 처음이시기도 하니…&n전부 맛을 본다는 느낌으로…

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_35.english: By the way, I heard that Soulworkers don't usually feel hunger. Is it different for you, Sergeant?
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_35.korean: 그런데 소울워커는 원래 배고픔을 잘 느끼지 않는다고 들었는데, 하사님은 다른가요?

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_36.english: Second-generation Soulworkers have merely been trained on how to fight as Soulworkers. They are fundamentally different from true Soulworkers.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_36.korean: 2세대 소울워커는 소울워커로서 싸우는 방법을 훈련받았을 뿐입니다.&n진짜 소울워커와는 본질적으로 다릅니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_37.english: Therefore, after combat, you must replenish calories through combat meals and recover from fatigue through combat sleep.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_37.korean: 따라서 전투 후에는 반드시  전투 취식을 통한 열량 보충과 전투 취침을 통해 피로를 회복해야 합니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_38.english: I see... But combat... eating? If "combat" is attached, is it different from a regular meal?
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_38.korean: 그렇군요…&n그런데 전투… 취식? 전투가 붙으면 그냥 식사와 다른 건가요?

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_4.english: Checking on your team members' condition is a basic duty of a commander. I'm not scolding you, so please be honest.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_4.korean: 대원의 상태를 살피는 건 지휘관의 기본이야.&n나무라는 게 아니니까 솔직히 말해줘.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_40.english: Oh, I see. Here, here are the combat rations!
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_40.korean: 그, 그렇군요.&n자, 전투 식량 여기 있습니다!

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_42.english: You're welcome. Since I cannot go into combat myself, it is my duty to handle supplies like this.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_42.korean: 별말씀을요.&n직접 전투에 나설 수 없는 만큼, 이렇게 보급을 맡는 것이 제 임무니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_43.english: I'm not sure if I'm actually being of any help, but I'm just doing my best to assist the squad members.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_43.korean: 과연 도움이 되고 있을지는 잘 모르겠지만, 최선을 다해 분대원들을 돕고 있을 뿐이에요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_44.english: Supply is very important. It is difficult to do without it.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_45.english: If I hadn't received supplies, I wouldn't have been able to properly carry out even the next mission.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_45.korean: 만약 보급을 받지 못했다면 저는 다음 임무조차 제대로 수행할 수 없었을 겁니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_46.english: Silky helped me. So I should thank her.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_46.korean: 실키는 저를 도와준 겁니다. 그러니 감사를 드려야 합니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_47.english: Uh... hahaha... Sergeant Inabi, you are the first person to say that to me.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_47.korean: 어… 아하하…&n그렇게 말씀해 주신 분은 이나비 하사님이 처음이에요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_48.english: Come to think of it now… my squad members also thanked me every time I handed out supplies. There must have been a meaning behind it.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_48.korean: 지금 생각해 보면… 저희 분대원들도 제가 보급품을 나눠줄 때마다 고맙다고 했어요.&n분명 그런 의미가 담겨있었던 거겠죠.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_49.english: Hehe, thank you so much. Thanks to you, Staff Sergeant, I think I've realized something! Please come to me anytime if you need supplies!
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_49.korean: 후후, 저야말로 감사해요. 하사님 덕분에 뭔가 깨달은 것 같아요!&n언제든지 보급품이 필요하면 저에게 와주세요!

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_5.english: That… I apologize. Due to recent repetitive activity, your physical function has deteriorated, and it is determined that you need to replenish your calories.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_5.korean: 그건… 죄송합니다.&n최근 반복된 활동으로 신체 기능이 저하되어, 열량 보충이 필요하다고 판단됩니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_51.english: Ah, Leprechaun Squad Leader! That's Staff Sergeant Inabi over there!

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_52.english: You have combat rations spread out on the table... Are you having a meal?
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_52.korean: 테이블 위에 전투 식량을 펼쳐놓고… 식사 중이신 건가요?

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_53.english: Hello, Staff Sergeant Inabi! Are you having a meal?

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_55.english: Yes… that’s right. I am currently in a very difficult situation…
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_55.korean: 네… 맞습니다.&n저는 지금 상당히 곤란한 상황에 놓였습니다…

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_56.english: Please let me know if you are having trouble. I'll help you!

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_57.english: That's right! We're from the same Steel Line unit, aren't we? I'm always indebted to you, Leprechaun Squad Leader, too!
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_57.korean: 맞슴다! 저희는 같은 스틸 라인 부대지 않슴까!&n레프리콘 분대장님에게는 저도 항상 신세 지고 있슴다!

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_58.english: I wish Brownie would stop being so indebted to me now, though.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_58.korean: 브라우니는 이젠 좀 그만 신세 졌으면 하지만요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_6.english: Uh... so you're saying you want to eat?
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_6.korean: 어… 그러니까 밥이 먹고 싶다는 거지?

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_60.english: Are you talking about the combat rations placed on the table? Is there something wrong with the combat rations?
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_60.korean: 이거라면 테이블 위에 올려진 전투 식량 말인가요?&n전투 식량에 무슨 문제라도 있나요?

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_62.english: I don't know how to use it...

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_63.english: If you pull here like this!

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_64.english: Smoke rises from inside as it heats up! If you wait just 15 minutes like this, you can enjoy a piping hot meal!
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_64.korean: 안에서 연기가 올라오면서 발열이 시작됨다!&n이렇게 15분만 기다리면 따끈따끈한 밥을 먹을 수 있슴다!

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_66.english: I was wondering what was going on... I see you didn't know how to use it.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_67.english: It can't be helped. We never received this type of combat ration at the training camp.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_67.korean: 어쩔 수 없습니다.&n훈련소에서는 이런 형식의 전투 식량을 보급 받은 적이 없었습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_69.english: I received high-energy compressed block bars and squeezeable high-energy pastes designed for immediate consumption without waiting time.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_69.korean: 대기 시간 없이 즉각 섭취할 수 있게 만들어진 고에너지 압축 블록 바, 짜먹을 수 있는 고에너지 페이스트를 받았습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_70.english: Ugh... just hearing about it makes me feel like it tastes awful...
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_70.korean: 으으… 듣기만 해도 맛이 없다는 게 느껴짐다…

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_72.english: Still, Orca's combat rations have a very good reputation among the squad members, so you will like them.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_72.korean: 그래도 오르카의 전투 식량은 대원들 사이에서도 평판이 아주 좋으니 마음에 드실 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_73.english: That's right! Just so you know, I like Type 3 the best because it contains dessert! Which one do you like, Sergeant Inabi?
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_73.korean: 맞슴다! 참고로 저는 디저트가 들어 있는 3형을 제일 좋아함다!&n이나비 하사님은 어느 게 마음에 드심까?

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_74.english: I haven't tried it yet, so I'm not sure. I will give my evaluation after tasting it this time.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_74.korean: 아직 취식하지 않았기에 잘 모르겠습니다.&n이번에 맛을 보고 평가를 내리겠습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_75.english: So that's why you received all three... That's quite a lot; can you eat it all by yourself?
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_75.korean: 그래서 세 개를 전부 받으셨군요…&n양이 꽤 많은데, 혼자 다 드실 수 있으세요?

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_76.english: Yes! No problem! We have plenty of time!

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_8.english: So you're basically saying you want to eat?
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_8.korean: 결국 밥 먹고 싶다는 거 아냐?

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_80.english: Haha... Maybe it's the delicious smell, but I've gotten hungry...
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_80.korean: 하하… 맛있는 냄새 때문인지 배가 고파졌슴다…

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_81.english: It's not like I'm a kid... well, it certainly smells delicious, but...
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_81.korean: 애도 아니고… 뭐, 확실히 맛있는 냄새가 나지만…

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_86.english: … If you don’t mind, wouldn’t you like to share this and have a combat meal together?
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_86.korean: …괜찮다면 이걸 나눠서 다 같이 전투 취식하지 않겠습니까?

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_88.english: Brownie! This is Sergeant Inabi's combat ration!
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_88.korean: 브라우니! 이건 이나비 하사님의 전투 식량이잖아요!

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_89.english: It's fine. Even if you consume just one, you can secure enough calories to perform the next mission.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_89.korean: 괜찮습니다.&n하나만 섭취해도 다음 임무를 수행할 열량은 충분히 확…보… 할 수 있습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_90.english: And… I think it is only natural to share with a hungry colleague.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_90.korean: 그리고… 배고픈 동료가 있다면 나누는 게 당연하다고 생각합니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_92.english: In that case, how about we do it this way? Sergeant, you want to taste all three types of combat rations, right?
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_92.korean: 그렇다면 이렇게 하는 건 어떨까요?&n하사님은 세 개의 전투 식량 맛을 전부 보고 싶으신 거잖아요?

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_93.english: In that case, we'll divide the three evenly. That way, we can taste everything without missing anything, right?
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_93.korean: 그렇다면 세 개를 골고루 나눠 먹는 거예요.&n이러면 빠짐없이 전부 맛을 볼 수 있겠죠?

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_95.english: Then I will divide it equally! Just leave it to me!

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_96.english: Brownie, it hasn't been 15 minutes yet!

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_97.english: That is correct. You have to wait exactly 5 minutes and 37 seconds longer.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_98.english: But you know... what does "combat eating" mean?

LastCorruptedRecord4-3SUBED_10.english: Oh, I see. In that case, does Ms. Lily have something that attracts people?
LastCorruptedRecord4-3SUBED_10.korean: 어머, 그렇군요.&n그렇다면 릴리 씨에게는 사람을 끌어당기는 무언가가 있는 걸까요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3SUBED_12.english: I was disappointed that I couldn't use the virtual reality device, but I'm glad to have met Lily like this.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3SUBED_12.korean: 가상 현실 장치가 쓸 수 없게 되는 바람에 아쉬웠는데 이렇게 릴리 씨를 알게 돼서 다행이에요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3SUBED_13.english: There are a mountain of things I want to know.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3SUBED_14.english: Then let's get to know each other. I also still have a lot of things I want to ask Lily.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3SUBED_14.korean: 그럼 같이 알아가도록 해요.&n저도 아직 릴리에게 묻고 싶은 게 많이 있어요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3SUBED_15.english: Hehe, that's great. You'll definitely have a productive time.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3SUBED_15.korean: 후후, 좋네요.&n분명 유익한 시간을 가질 수 있을 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3SUBED_16.english: Oh, is it okay if I call you Lily too?

LastCorruptedRecord4-3SUBED_17.english: It's okay. A friend of a friend is a friend.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3SUBED_23.english: They knew nothing about each other and said nothing, yet they were two people who felt a bond stronger than anyone else's.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3SUBED_23.korean: 서로에 대해서 아무것도 모르고 아무 말도 하지 않았지만, 그 누구보다 끈끈한 무언가를 느끼는 두 사람이었다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3SUBED_5.english: Let me introduce her. She is Lily Blümmerchen.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3SUBED_6.english: Lily, these are Dracurina and Azaz, whom I mentioned.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3SUBED_6.korean: 릴리, 이쪽은 제가 말했던 드라큐리나와 아자즈에요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3SUBED_7.english: Hello. I heard about you from Eternity. Nice to meet you.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3SUBED_8.english: Maybe it's because I met someone new like this, but I feel like good inspiration will come to me.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3SUBED_8.korean: 이렇게 새로운 분을 만나서 그런지 좋은 영감이 떠오를 것 같아요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3SUBED_9.english: I understand. There was something that resonated with me when I first met Lily, too.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3SUBED_9.korean: 이해해요.&n저도 릴리를 처음 만났을 때 와닿은 무언가가 있었어요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_1.english: There is something ominous about this place.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_10.english: However… I am sorry. I cannot follow you, Godmother, right now.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_10.korean: 하지만… 죄송합니다.&n지금 당장은 대모 님을 따라갈 수 없습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_11.english: That's a shame. Hmm... I'd love to go with you right away. Is there a reason?
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_11.korean: 그건 아쉽구나.&n흐음… 당장이라도 함께 가고 싶은데, 무슨 이유라도 있는 게냐?

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_12.english: By the Commander's order, everything seen in this location must be reported first. For now, I will return to the base first to speak about the Matriarch.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_12.korean: 사령관님의 지시로 이 장소에서 보이는 모든 것들은 우선 보고하여야 합니다.&n지금은 먼저 주둔지로 돌아가 대모 님에 대해 이야기하겠습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_13.english: Now that your old lady is here, you don't need that kind of hassle. Come on, let's go together right now.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_13.korean: 이 할미가 왔는데 그런 귀찮은 건 필요 없잖니.&n자, 당장 이 할미와 함께 가자꾸나.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_14.english: I am truly sorry. To me, the Commander's orders… are absolute.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_15.english: Sigh, I get it. It can't be helped.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_16.english: Then, this old lady will wait here. Go ahead.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_17.english: How about going to the base with me?
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_17.korean: 저와 함께 주둔지로 가 보시는 건 어떻습니까?

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_18.english: That is difficult. This old woman is exhausted, so I want to stay here for a while.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_18.korean: 그건 어렵구나.&n이 할미는 지쳐서, 당분간 이곳에서 머무르고 싶단다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_19.english: In that case, I ask that you wait until I return.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_19.korean: 그렇다면 다녀올 때까지 기다려 주시길 부탁드립니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_2.english: Oh, you've come. This old lady has been waiting for you.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_2.korean: 오오, 왔구나.&n이 할미가 계속 기다리고 있었단다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_20.english: Yes, I will gladly wait for our butterfly.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_20.korean: 그래, 우리 나비를 위해서라면 기꺼이 기다리마.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_21.english: Commander, I have returned from the search mission for the missing persons.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_22.english: You're back. Was everything okay, Nabi?

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_23.english: Yes, I'm fine. By any chance... what about the others?

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_25.english: Sergeant Brownie, can't you sleep because you're getting discharged tomorrow?
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_25.korean: 브라우니 병장님, 내일 전역이라 그런지 잠이 안 오심까?

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_26.english: Yeah... I can't sleep because I feel like tonight is too precious to waste. I still can't believe I'm leaving this place tomorrow.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_26.korean: 그래… 오늘밤이 아까워서 잠이 안 와.&n내일이면 이곳을 떠난다니, 아직도 믿기지가 않네.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_27.english: The sweat shed during training has permeated every corner of the barracks; now, I am saying goodbye forever to this smell that has become as familiar as the scent of home…
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_27.korean: 훈련으로 흘린 땀이 내무반 곳곳에 배어,&n이젠 집 냄새처럼 익숙해져 버린 이 냄새와도 영원히 이별이구나…

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_28.english: People would think I'm crazy if they heard this, but I wish I could stay just one more week… Then I could say a wonderful goodbye to everyone I've grown fond of…
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_28.korean: 남들이 들으면 미쳤다고 하겠지만, 딱 일주일만 더 있었으면 좋겠다…&n그러면 정든 모두와 멋지게 작별할 수 있을 텐데…

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_3.english: Godmother? I haven't received any information that you have come here.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_3.korean: 대모님?&n이곳에 오셨다는 정보는 받은 적이 없었습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_30.english: Yeah… that’s how it should be.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_31.english: Goodbye… my days in the Steel Line…
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_31.korean: 안녕… 내 스틸 라인 부대의 나날들아…

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_32.english: He's smiling... should I wake him up?

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_33.english: I already tried that, but it didn't work. It would be best to just leave it alone for now.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_33.korean: 이미 시도했지만 소용없었어요.&n지금은 그냥 두는 게 좋을 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_34.english: That way... wouldn't it be more enjoyable when you wake up from the fantasy? Hehe...
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_34.korean: 그러는 편이... 환상에서 깨어났을 때 즐겁지 않겠어요? 후후…

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_36.english: I have one report to give you. I met the Godmother at the scene.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_36.korean: 한 가지 보고드릴 것이 있습니다.&n현장에서… 대모 님을 만났습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_37.english: Godmother? That old woman has never been here.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_37.korean: 대모라고? 그 늙은이라면 이곳에 온 적이 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_38.english: They said they came secretly without the commander knowing.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_4.english: Hehe, I suppose so. I came here secretly, without the Commander knowing, because I missed our Nabi so much.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_4.korean: 후후, 그렇겠지.&n우리 나비가 너무나도 보고 싶어서, 사령관 몰래 온 것이란다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_40.english: He told me to leave the side of humans and travel forever within this void.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_40.korean: 저에게 인간의 곁을 떠나 이 공백의 안에서 영원히 여행하자고 했습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_41.english: Although there was some confusion in the chain of command, I prioritized the Commander's instructions, keeping in mind the advice that everything could be an illusion.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_41.korean: 명령체계에 다소 혼란이 있었습니다만, 모든 것이 환상일 수 있다는 조언을 염두하여 사령관님의 지시를 우선하였습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_42.english: If the Commander hadn't given me advice... I might have followed it immediately.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_42.korean: 사령관님께서 조언을 해주지 않으셨다면… 곧장 따랐을지도 모릅니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_43.english: So you're saying there was evidence to believe it wasn't an illusion...
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_43.korean: 환상이 아니라고 믿을 만한 증거가 있었다는 거군…

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_44.english: That is correct. The voice, appearance, and even the atmosphere were so identical... it was actually harder to suspect that it wasn't the Godmother.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_44.korean: 그렇습니다. 목소리, 외모, 분위기까지 너무도 똑같아서…&n도리어 대모 님이 아니라고 의심하는 것이 더 어려웠습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_45.english: My sense of reality dulled as if in a dream, and I came to believe things as they were for granted. If there hadn't been an order to report, even I...
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_45.korean: 꿈처럼 현실감각이 무뎌지고, 있는 그대로를 당연하게 믿어버렸습니다.&n보고하라는 지시가 없었다면, 저라도…

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_46.english: But the butterfly didn't follow. That's enough. You did well.
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_46.korean: 하지만 나비는 따라가지 않았어.&n그걸로 충분해. 잘했어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_48.english: Take a short break until the next mission.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_49.english: Yes, then I will take a rest!

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_5.english: You wanted to see me, so you did it secretly... I am happy.
